title: Senior Specialist - Business Capability Owner
description: job summary show join the global business transformation team as a business capability owner. this role offers a dynamic environment with growth opportunities. tasks act as the main contact for business capabilities in p2p/logistics. develop a vision and roadmap aligned with organizational goals. lead process optimization initiatives from start to finish. skills 5 years in operations, logistics, or business analysis required. strong analytical and problem-solving skills are essential. experience with erp systems like dynamics 365 is preferred. is this helpful? about the job in short the global business transformation team is looking for a business capability owner to join the supply chain enablement p2p/logistics team at the on labs in zurich. we are excited to offer this role to a driven team player with exceptional problem-solving skills and the mindset to leverage existing processes while championing new initiatives. you will work in an environment where we make ideas happen fast, but thoughtfully. you will take end-to-end responsibility for owning, prioritizing and bringing processes and technology to the next level by leveraging our capability maturity model (cmm) in order to establish superior operational performance, often charting the course where predefined paths do not exist. with your proven ability of developing long term visions as well as project management, business analysis and technical skill set, along with your deep knowledge of supply chain management with an extra focus on logistics, you will contribute to major transformation projects, offering great opportunities for growth in your position! your mission as business capability owner for p2p/logistics value stream, act as the single point of contact for a given set of business capabilities across the organization. develop a clear vision and roadmap for the business capabilities under your responsibility aligned with organizational goals. leverage the cmm (capability maturity model) as a key framework to assess the current state of the business capabilities and define steps for progression. transform the operations business capability landscape by leading complex process and system optimisation initiatives from requirements gathering throughout implementation and stabilization. partner with our technology team to implement and align technology solutions with operational needs. identify underlying issues and root causes, analyze complex problems and drive their resolution within the on team as well as with external partners. support company project initiatives by acting as the p2p/logistics workstream representative for the team. be the main point of contact for the project manager and making sure the rest of the team is involved to assess the changes on their respective business capabilities. support our logistics network strategy and implementation teams to ensure we deliver warehouse solutions within the defined timelines working closely with our 3pl partners and internal tech team on the systems landscape. your story degree or deep knowledge in supply chain, logistics, business administration, technology, or related fields. 5+ years of relevant experience as an operations business capability owner, business analyst, or in a logistics role, with a strong emphasis on procure-to-pay (p2p) and logistics process management. deep functional and strategic understanding of the business capability owner role and its impact on organizational strategy is required. technical knowledge of erp systems, preferably dynamics 365, and general knowledge about wms systems are highly appreciated. proven analytical and critical thinking skills, with demonstrated independent decision-making capability, leveraging advanced analytics (or intelligent automation) and advanced proficiency with google workspace applications (docs, sheets, etc.). ability to drive operational excellence while bringing expertise to company projects. cross-functional collaboration and clear communication come naturally. you proactively identify areas for improvement and propose innovative, high-impact solutions, balancing the need for innovation with operational efficiency. you are comfortable working highly independently and proactive initiative comes naturally. you can multitask, prioritize and thrive in an energetic and fast-paced environment. you demonstrate resilience and flexibility and you are attentive to industry trends and best practices. proficiency in english. other languages are a plus. about the team as business capability owners for procure to pay and logistics value stream, we define, manage, and optimize business capabilities within the global operations organisation in order to align with on’s organizational strategy and deliver measurable value for the company.we are focused, data-driven but also action-oriented. we define functions that drive business success while continuously challenging the status quo and “industry standards”.we work closely with various teams such as supply chain, warehousing, regional operations, sourcing, commercial, finance, and technology in order to support our business’ global growth whilst continuously ensuring operational excellence.

title: Junior ML Ops Engineer
description: about the job building the bank of tomorrow takes more than skills. it means combining our differences to imagine, discuss, code, develop, test, learn… and celebrate every step together. share our vibes? join swissquote to unleash your potential. we are the swiss leader in online banking and we provide trading, investing and banking services to +650’000 clients through our performant and secured digital platforms. our +1200 employees work in a flexible way, without dress code and in multicultural teams. by having a huge impact on the industry, they are growing their skills portfolio and boosting their career in a fast-pace environment. have a look behind the scenes by checking humans of swissquote on instagram. we are all in at swissquote. as an equal opportunity employer, we welcome candidates from all backgrounds, experiences and perspectives to join our team and contribute to our shared success. are you all in? don’t be shy, apply! junior ml ops engineer as our portfolio of production ai systems continues to grow, so does the need for engineering excellence around reliability, scalability, and governance. to sustain this momentum, we are strengthening the team that ensures our models run seamlessly in production—delivering value every day while meeting the highest standards of compliance and observability. the data science team is looking for a junior mlops engineer to help improve and streamline the lifecycle of our ai models, from development to production. this role is particularly exciting because you will not be limited to a single domain; you will work across a diverse array of topics surrounding production-deployed models, gaining deep hands-on experience with the entire lifecycle of an ai product. by joining the team, you will contribute to building the backbone that supports the bank's ai capabilities, ensuring efficiency and governance across the board. as a junior mlops engineer you will: automate monitoring & observability: develop systems to automate the evaluation of deployed ai applications. you will work on improving observability for both classical machine learning models and generative models, ensuring we have real-time insights into performance and health. build deployment platforms: contribute to the development of an internal platform based on mlflow. you will help streamline the developer experience by creating tools for model and agent versioning, packaging, and seamless deployment onto our internal infrastructure. orchestrate pipelines: design, optimize, and orchestrate complex data and training pipelines using argo workflows, ensuring that our model training processes are reproducible and efficient. enforce ai governance: help build a governance platform that acts as a central control plane, ensuring that all deployed ai applications strictly adhere to company regulations and compliance standards. qualifications educational background: degree in computer science, data science, engineering, or a related field. python proficiency: strong command of python; you write clean, maintainable code and care about engineering best practices. mlops/devops foundations: understanding of devops concepts such as ci/cd (github actions) and containerization (docker, kubernetes). prior hands-on experience is a strong plus. infrastructure mindset: you are motivated by "what happens after the model is trained"—specifically how models are deployed, scaled, and monitored in production environments. web development awareness: familiarity with frontend development is a plus (for building internal tools and dashboards). growth mindset: you are organized, self-motivated, and comfortable ramping up quickly on new technologies and tools. communication: fluent in english and able to collaborate effectively within a technical team.

title: Automation & Embedded Software Developer
description: about the job join bobst as automation & embedded software engineer. within our group technology r&d, you will work at the heart of innovation, contributing to next‑generation digital printing solutions used worldwide. as an automation & embedded software developer, you will join a dedicated and collaborative team working with modern tools and engineering practices to deliver high‑performance, reliable and cutting‑edge products. here, you will grow in an environment that values curiosity, continuous learning, teamwork and the drive to turn ambitious ideas into real industrial impact. main responsibilities design, develop and maintain the automated software for the different modules of our digital printing modules, develop efficient pid regulation of our machines, enforce the use of shared components across group technology, participate to the extension of the automated test framework, collaborate with mechanical, electrical and software development teams to propose and implement optimal solutions, work closely with service and commissioning teams to improve the process of testing, installing, configuring machines, and troubleshooting, optimize printing processes to continuously improve its quality and stability, error analysis and troubleshooting of machines on site or at our customers. qualifications bsc or msc in electrical engineering, automation, or computer science, 3-5 years of experience developing plc applications using structured text language, preferable with siemens or beckhoff system ability to design electrical schematic is a strong asset, experience with prototype testing and commissioning, good experience with field bus such as ethercat or profinet, motion and safety, good experience with opc-ua and database, 2 years of experience with embedded software development, experience with state machine and pid regulation, knowledge of c#, wpf and c++ for desktop applications is an asset, knowledge of digital printing technologies is an asset, personality traits proactive and eager to learn, detail-oriented with a strong focus on quality, strong interpersonal skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, adaptable and open to learning new technologies and methodologies, enthusiastic about continuous improvement and innovation, ready to travel periodically (10-20%), fluent in english. french and italian skills would be a strong asset. why bobst? at bobst, we are committed to developing technologies that push the boundaries of innovation and help transform the packaging industry. by joining us, you will have the opportunity to work on meaningful products, solve complex technical challenges, and collaborate with experts who share a passion for excellence and high‑quality engineering. if you are motivated by innovation, eager to learn, and want to contribute to solutions that make a real difference in industrial performance and customer experience, this role offers the environment to thrive. join us – and grow with us. bobst is an engineering company, pioneering intelligent solutions that shape the future of the packaging world. at bobst, you make an impact on a global scale – through innovation and advanced technology. you grow by mastering challenges – in a team that strives for excellence. and you enjoy a culture of a family-run enterprise, where values are truly lived. with the combined forces of more than 6400 people and business activities in more than 50 countries, we are positioned as the innovation leader in our industry.

title: Chief Technology Officer
description: about the job are you a visionary tech leader with a passion for building scalable digital products? then join neho as our chief technology officer (cto) and help shape the future of real estate in switzerland. neho is one of switzerland’s leading real estate brokerage companies, redefining the industry through innovation. we combine human expertise with powerful digital solutions to deliver a faster, more transparent, and more efficient real estate experience. our approach has been recognised with prestigious awards, including the sef award 2023. what truly sets us apart is our fixed-price model, offering clients a modern alternative to traditional commission-based services, powered by advanced technology. if you are bold, adaptable, and energized by complex challenges, you’ll thrive at neho. our environment is fast-paced, entrepreneurial, and driven by continuous learning. as cto, you will play a pivotal role in shaping our technological vision, scaling our platforms, and empowering teams across the company while leading a talented, fully remote development team. a key focus of this role will be evolving our existing tech stack towards a more ai-driven technology landscape, enabling smarter, more automated, and more scalable products and processes. your impact will extend far beyond neho: together, we aim not only to lead the market, but to fundamentally reinvent how real estate works. chief technology officer your tasks 1. technology strategy & architecture define and drive neho’s technology vision and roadmap in line with business goals lead the design, development, and transformation of our internal platforms, crm, and digital tools drive the strategic evolution of our core technology stack toward an ai-centric architecture, embedding machine learning and intelligent automation to enhance product value, scalability, and operational efficiency lead architectural decisions across platforms, data, and cloud strategy establish best practices across software development, devops, testing, and quality 2. leadership recruit senior engineers and engineering leaders as the organization scales lead and structure a fully remote team of 20 developers, provide guidance and develop internal leaders enable and support teams in adopting ai-driven approaches while maintaining strong engineering fundamentals 3. execution & delivery excellence ensure fast, reliable, and predictable delivery of product and platform initiatives establish effective delivery processes (agile/shape-up/hybrid) remove blockers and manage cross-team dependencies hold teams accountable for outcomes, not just output 4. quality, security & operational stability set standards for code quality, testing, and reviews own system reliability, monitoring, and incident response ensure security, privacy, and compliance (gdpr, soc2, etc. where relevant) identify, manage, and mitigate technical risks as the platform scales 5. business & stakeholder alignment translate business needs into scalable technical solutions work closely with ceo, head of product, and other leaders on priorities clearly communicate technical trade-offs and translate to non-technical stakeholders support go-to-market initiatives, integrations, and evolving customer needs what we offer a unique career opportunity to lead the technology function of a fast-growing scale-up within the real estate industry shape the future of real estate tech in switzerland : define the technology strategy, drive platform development, and deliver data-driven, efficient, and scalable solutions that give neho a competitive edge make a tangible impact by shaping both technology and business initiatives, contributing your ideas directly to strategic decision-making enjoy flat hierarchies, quick decision-making processes, and the freedom to work autonomously and leave your mark be part of an energetic, forward-thinking team spanning our hq in lausanne and our techlab in romania thrive in an entrepreneurial, innovative culture that values transparency, fairness, and strong team support competitive benefits including 5 weeks of vacation, fully paid maternity/paternity leave, remote work options, regular team events, and partner discounts what you bring essential 5+ years of experience in leading remote tech teams in a cto function or equivalent role strong track record working for startups or scale-ups with the ability to thrive in dynamic, high-growth environments passionate about leading, coaching and mentoring engineering teams, challenging technical decisions, identifying skill gaps, and driving continuous improvement in team performance and efficiency experience leading ai-driven projects or integrating ai into products or processes proven experience leading the evolution of technology platforms to improve productivity, efficiency, and engineering output strong technical foundation with the ability to understand, evaluate, and guide engineering decisions demonstrated knowledge in managing and maintaining web-based crm systems, ensuring smooth operation and supporting ongoing development and optimization results-driven with a strong commitment to achieving excellence and driving initiatives across the organization proven ability to collaborate across departments and work with management to define technology strategy, product roadmaps, and execution plans professional proficiency in english nice to have experience in transitions towards ai-driven systems or architectures expertise with php, laravel at scale and react architecture knowledge of additional technologies listed in tech stack below french or romanian language skills what you are working with as our cto, you will lead a sophisticated technology landscape that powers our platforms and digital products. while hands-on coding is not required, familiarity with some technologies would be beneficial. the current stack includes: back-end: php with laravel, including advanced features like service containers, facades, middleware, service providers, and optimized database interactions with eloquent orm (handling n+1 issues, eager loading, and scopes) front-end: reactjs for our crms and customer-facing experiences, plus nextjs for a recently acquired platform ui / styling: bootstrap (css framework) for responsive and scalable interfaces apis & integrations: rest and graphql for seamless internal and external integrations background processes & queues: redis, horizon, and job queues for efficient, reliable asynchronous processing authentication & security: robust auth systems including sanctum, passport, and oauth2. if this sounds like the right professional opportunity for you, then apply now with your cv in english . please note that we are only considering applications submitted through our career page: https://careers.neho.ch/

title: IT Support Technician
description: about the job epfl, the swiss federal institute of technology in lausanne, is one of the most dynamic university campuses in europe and ranks among the top 20 universities worldwide. the epfl employs more than 6,500 people supporting the three main missions of the institution: education, research and innovation. the epfl campus offers an exceptional working environment at the heart of a community of more than 17,000 people, including over 12,500 students and 4,000 researchers from more than 120 different countries. it support technician mission epfl, the swiss federal institute of technology in lausanne, is one of the most dynamic university campuses in europe and ranks among the top 20 universities worldwide. epfl's school of engineering is now looking for an it support technician to join their it support team onsite at epfl's lausanne campus, with regular work (typically 1-2 days per week) at the epfl neuchâtel campus. main duties and responsibilities it support: you will join a small, collaborative it support team with structured onboarding and team support, enabling you to deliver it support to onsite and remote users either in person, or via emails, tickets, and calls, resolving both basic and progressively more complex issues. hardware management: assist clients in it equipment purchasing and deployments (windows, macos, linux) using fleet management and other tools. diagnose and resolve hardware issues. unified communications: provide support for videoconferencing tools, rooms and events. it classroom support: set up and troubleshoot it equipment and applications in it classrooms. software support and patch management: install and configure software, troubleshoot application-related issues and manage it software updates for end-user machines. network access: manage client access to the epfl network and resolve connectivity issues. documentation: actively maintain the it documentation - both internal and client facing - as part of the support team's responsibilities. it projects: participate in it infrastructure upgrades, migrations, and faculty-wide rollouts. security: contribute to it security by taking care of hardware and software lifecycle. profile required qualifications: experience in it support with a strong customer service approach. familiarity with it support ticket management systems (e.g. servicenow). proficiency in deploying, managing and troubleshooting at least two of the following operating systems: linux, macos or windows. experience with it hardware management (laptops, workstations, pc components). experience with av and videoconferencing tools (e.g., zoom, teams). knowledge of concepts such as active directory, ldap, and gpo. good knowledge of networking fundamentals (e.g. ip addressing, firewalls, port openings, vpn). nice-to-have qualifications: experience in scripting (e.g. linux: bash; or windows: batch/powershell) or in programming languages and tools (e.g. python, git). knowledge of itil or similar industry best practices (incident / change management). your profile: bachelors in computer science or cfc, with at least 3-5 years of working in the it field. customer-focused, easy to approach, calm and flexible mindset: you enjoy working with people. you enjoy troubleshooting problems and juggling different requests in a dynamic environment. willingness to support events occasionally outside regular hours. fluent in french and english; verbal and written. motivated, team-oriented and ability to meet deadlines. detail-oriented with a commitment to continuous learning and team collaboration. we offer full-time permanent position according to swiss federal salary scales. work at a world-class institution ranked in the global top 10 for engineering and technology. exposure to a diverse and technically rich environment supporting researchers, engineers, and students at the forefront of science and technology. opportunities to grow into more specialized roles (systems, endpoint management, automation) depending on interest and performance. diverse, multicultural working environment. family-friendly policies, including child and education allowances. discounts for public transport and car sharing services at reduced prices. further information: work location: primary work location is epfl's lausanne campus. the role requires presence also at epfl neuchâtel campus, typically 1-2 days per week, based on client demand; travel costs are compensated according to epfl policy. ready to join our innovative team? we invite you to apply by submitting your cv and a cover letter (in english or french) via epfl's official recruitment platform. in your cover letter, please include a short overview about projects you may have done - either personal or professional - with the technologies below: 1. linux 2. macos 3. windows 4. hardware (laptops, workstations, or other devices) 5. scripting or programming informations contract start date : 06/01/2026 activity rate : 100,00 contract type: cdi reference: 2078

title: Senior Data Engineer
description: job summary show join our innovative data team to work on exciting projects. enjoy a dynamic work environment with continuous learning opportunities. tasks develop complex data-processing pipelines in the cloud or on-premise. consult on modern data solutions and technology choices for clients. take responsibility for data-driven consulting mandates. skills degree in it, computer science, or related field; 5+ years experience. proficient in sql and python; knowledge of iac and automation tools. experience with data technologies from major cloud providers. is this helpful? about the job what to expect exciting and innovative data projects for our clients together with our data and machine learning engineers, you develop complex data processing pipelines in the cloud or on-premise you take responsibility for data-driven consulting mandates you advise our clients on the implementation of modern data storage solutions and technology selection you take content responsibility for technological subject areas continuous learning and ongoing training as well as insights into the various industries of our clients variety and exciting collaboration in internal project teams as well as on-site with our clients what you bring degree from a (technical) university of applied sciences in information technology, computer science, business informatics, or a related field more than 5 years of proven experience on relevant projects very good knowledge of sql and python basic knowledge in working with infrastructure as code (iac) and automation tools such as terraform, azure arm, azure devops, and gitlab ci solid knowledge of relevant technologies such as spark, hive, apache iceberg, airflow, mageai, pandas, pyspark, or similar practical experience and good knowledge in building data lakes or data lakehouses experience in software development practical experience with etl and elt processes experience with data technologies from one of the major cloud providers we are looking for you – become part of our team

title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (Computer Vision)
description: job summary show join scandit, a tech leader transforming industries with innovative solutions. enjoy a vibrant work culture that fosters creativity and growth. tasks create digital twins of complex labels and identification documents. drive semantic document parsing for customer use cases effectively. mentor team members on coding and engineering best practices. skills 5+ years in ml with proven success in product launches required. fluency in c++ and python is essential for this role. experience with machine learning frameworks like tensorflow or pytorch. is this helpful? about the job scandit gives people superpowers. whether enabling delivery drivers to make quicker deliveries, matching a patient with their medication, or allowing retailers to make store operations more efficient, our technology automates workflows and provides actionable insights to help businesses in a variety of industries. join us, as we continue to expand, grow and innovate, and help take scandit to the next level. about the role we are looking for a new colleague to join the label capture team and work on creating digital twins of complex labels and identification documents. you will be responsible for evolving our current product by adding new features and optimizing the existing offering. you will work on computer vision and deep learning algorithms to improve information extraction from printed documents beyond state of the art. if these challenges sound interesting to you, we’d love to hear from you! what you will do driving and solving semantic document parsing for our customer use cases be involved hands on in all phases of end to end quality improvements (defining and tracking metrics, prototyping, testing, integration of existing models, creation of new models, data collection, analysis, debugging) stay up to date with the latest research in document classification, text recognition and information extraction set direction and identify opportunities to push boundaries of recognition mentoring team members on code quality and engineering practices who you are you are a senior ml engineer who is passionate about building, shipping, and improving machine learning-powered systems. you have a proven track record of delivering state-of-the-art computer vision systems both on-device and on cloud and firsthand experience bringing them from the prototyping stage to production. you recognize that software development encompasses both technology and human interaction and feel comfortable working independently or on a team. while you stay on top of the state-of-the-art in cv/ml, you value proven technologies and small increments. you are creative and determined to solve real-world problems by thinking outside the box and making an impact. you thrive on tackling open problems, taking ownership, and effectively overcoming obstacles. you pay attention to details and at the same time are able to take pragmatic shortcuts to reach our goals. in particular, we are excited to hear from you if the following sounds like you: 5+ years of experience solving recognition problems in the industry with a proven track record of launched products fluency in c++ and python running ml models on mobile devices experience with relevant machine learning frameworks (pytorch, jax, tensorflow) skilled in software design, problem-solving, and debugging experience in computer vision systems extracting information from printed documents or experience with fine-tuning of vision-language models is a plus what we offer here are just some of the reasons why people choose to build their career at scandit: a highly skilled team and a fun environment where you can put your enthusiasm for cutting-edge technologies to use hackathons flexible, office, hybrid or home working people-first culture global team outings festive/end of year all company celebrations your birthday off an attractive individual equity plan in a growth company we are certified as a “great place to work” in 7 countries! excellent office infrastructure, optimized for hybrid working in zurich, warsaw, tampere, and london excellent support for remote work across switzerland, finland, poland, uk, italy and germany specific benefits related to the location you are joining who we are scandit enables enterprises and consumers to change the way they interact with everyday objects and augment the physical world with real-time data captured by scanning barcodes and recognizing text, objects, and other visual identifiers using smartphones, tablets, wearables, drones and robots. scandit’s mobile data capture platform is built on proprietary computer vision, augmented reality, and machine learning technologies. companies in industries such as retail, transportation & logistics, manufacturing, and healthcare can use scandit’s technology to create and power mobile apps for crucial enterprise workflows like mobile point of sale, mobile shopping, self-checkout, inventory management, and proof of delivery. many of the world’s most innovative and successful companies are benefiting from scandit’s enterprise-grade mobile data capture platform, including sephora, nissan, dhl, and levi strauss & co. scandit was founded by a group of researchers from eth zurich and mit. the company is headquartered in zurich and is also represented in boston, london, warsaw, tokyo and tampere. over the years, our company has evolved into a world-class team of mobile image processing, cloud-computing and “internet of things” experts from around the globe and has most recently also opened an office in tampere, finland. “everybody is welcome here” - is a celebrated component of our dna. at scandit we strive to create an inclusive environment that empowers our employees. we believe that our products and services benefit from our diverse backgrounds and experiences and are proud to be a safe space for all. all qualified applications will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, nationality, religion, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, age, physical [dis]ability or length of time spent unemployed.

title: Software Engineer Data Science
description: about the job software engineer data science werden sie teil unseres teams im geschäftszentrum «software engineering & it» in aarau. wir realisieren anspruchsvolle software-, machine-learning- und ki-lösungen für hochspezialisierte anwendungsfelder und schaffen so für unsere kunden einen direkten mehrwert aus ihren daten. führen sie unsere projekte zum erfolg: von explorativen datenanalyse über die machbarkeitsbeurteilung, die modell-entwicklung bis hin zur applikationsentwicklung und überführung in den betrieb. tätigkeitsgebiet ihre hauptaufgaben und verantwortlichkeiten data engineering & datenpipelines: anbindung und integration unterschiedlicher datenquellen (z.b. sql/nosql, apis, files, iot). entwicklung robuster datenpipelines für datenextraktion, -bereinigung, -transformation und -validierung. umsetzung von feature engineering und sicherstellung hoher datenqualität und nachvollziehbarkeit. machine learning & modellierung: konzeption, training, evaluation und optimierung von machine-learning-modellen mit unterschiedlichen ansätzen (z.b. xgboost, deep learning, reinforcement learning). entwicklung von modellen für verschiedene datentypen: strukturiert und unstrukturiert, von multidimensionalen zeitreihen bis zu bildern. reproduzierbares & rückverfolgbares ml-training: ausbau nachvollziehbarer trainings- und experimentierumgebungen (experiment tracking, versionierung von daten und modellen, model registry). sicherstellung von transparenz, reproduzierbarkeit und governance im gesamten ml-lifecycle. einsatz von ki in lösungen und entwicklungsprozess: mitarbeit bei konzeption, design, prototyping und umsetzung moderner lösungen mit integrierten ki-komponenten (llms, rag, tool-integration), sowie breiter einsatz moderner ki-tools im entwicklungsprozess. architektur und entwicklung datengetriebener softwarelösungen: konzeption, design, prototyping und umsetzung moderner software-anwendungen mit integrierten ml- und ki-komponenten sowie benutzerzentrierten oberflächen. integration von modellen in produktive systeme (apis, microservices, edge/cloud). mlops, dataops & devops: einsatz moderner werkzeuge und methoden zur automatisierung von daten- und ml-workflows. aufbau von ci/cd-pipelines für ml-systeme, monitoring von modellen im betrieb (performance, drift) und strukturierte qualitätssicherung. zusammenarbeit & enablement: enge zusammenarbeit mit softwareentwicklern, architekten und fachverantwortlichen unserer kunden. weiterentwicklung interner standards, best practices sowie unseres data- und ai-toolings. anforderung ihr profil und ihre expertise: ausbildung: sehr guter abschluss eines studiums (fh, eth, uni) in informatik, data science, mathematik, physik oder einer vergleichbaren fachrichtung. data engineering: fundierte erfahrung im umgang mit datenquellen (sql, nosql, unstrukturierte daten), im aufbau von datenpipelines sowie im feature engineering. verständnis für datenmodellierung, datenqualität und performance-optimierung. erfahrungen mit visualisierungs- und bi-tools sind ein plus. machine learning: mehrjährige erfahrung im design, training und deployment von ml-modellen (z.b. cnn, yolo, xgboost). vertrautheit mit gängigen frameworks (z.b. scikit-learn, pytorch, tensorflow) sowie mit evaluationsmethoden, hyperparameter-tuning und modellvalidierung. erfahrung mit zeitreihenanalyse oder reinforcement learning ist ein plus. softwareengineering: sehr gute programmierkenntnisse (insbesondere python), sowie erfahrung mit modernen software-architekturen, api-design, testing, code reviews und kollaborativer entwicklung. sehr gute erfahrungen beim einsatz von ki-tools im entwicklungsprozess (z.b. github copilot, claude code). kenntnisse in ui- oder web-technologien, c# oder java von vorteil. mlops & betrieb: erfahrung mit experiment-tracking, modellversionierung und deployment-strategien (z.b. mlflow). devops & qualitätssicherung: erste erfahrung mit ci/cd, automatisiertem testing, monitoring und observability. strukturierter umgang mit performance-, stabilitäts- und skalierungsanforderungen produktiver systeme. persönliche kompetenzen: analytische stärke, hoher qualitätsanspruch sowie freude an datengetriebenen fragestellungen, enger zusammenarbeit mit dem kunden und interdisziplinären projekten. strukturierte arbeitsweise, technisches urteilsvermögen und begeisterung für innovative lösungen in anspruchsvollen industriellen umfeldern. sprachen: sehr gute deutsch- und englischkenntnisse in wort und schrift. warum helbling? sie begleiten ihre projekte von der ersten datenanalyse über die modellierung bis zur produktiven integration und dem betrieb. sie arbeiten an technologisch anspruchsvollen vorhaben mit hoher fachlicher tiefe, von intelligenten analyseplattformen über predictive- und optimierungsmodelle bis hin zu strategischen daten- und ki-initiativen in unterschiedlichsten industrien. wir bieten ihnen dabei gestaltungsraum, moderne technologien und ein umfeld, das technologische exzellenz mit unternehmerischem denken verbindet - interdisziplinär, praxisnah und mit echter wirkung beim kunden. helbling benefits ein dynamisches und interdisziplinäres arbeitsumfeld mit flachen hierarchien und kurzen entscheidungswegen die möglichkeit mit ihrem engagement massgeblich zum projekterfolg beizutragen abwechslungsreiche projekte, in denen sie ihre technischen und sozialen fähigkeiten anwenden und weiterentwickeln können kompetente kolleginnen und kollegen sowie eine offene und wertschätzende firmenkultur eine moderne infrastruktur und attraktive arbeitsbedingungen sind sie interessiert? dann freuen wir uns über ihre aussagekräftigen und vollständigen bewerbungsunterlagen mit bezug auf die gewünschten fähigkeiten ausschliesslich über unser bewerberportal . wir bitten um verständnis dafür, dass wir nur direktbewerbungen berücksichtigen.

configuration facilities, enabling them to efficiently develop and deploy both traditional and machine learning algorithms written in python or java. more information here . your profile background in 3 years of post-graduation professional experience. you have never had a cern fellow or graduate contract before. additional information job closing date: 15.03.2026 at 23:59 cet. contract duration: 24 months, with a possible extension up to 36 months maximum. working hours: 40 hours per week job flexibility: fully onsite target start date: 01-may-2026 job reference: be-css-dsp-2026-23-grap field of work: software engineering and it benchmark job: 200020 - computing engineer global benefits a monthly stipend between 6372-7004 swiss francs per month (tax free) depending on your degree. 30 days of paid leave per year plus 2 weeks annual closure. coverage by cern’s comprehensive health insurance scheme (for yourself, your spouse and children), and membership of the cern pension fund. family, child and infant monthly allowances depending on your individual circumstances. a relocation package (installation grant and travel expenses) depending on your individual circumstances. possibility to extend your contract up to 36 months. on-the-job and formal training including language classes. overview of cern - discover a world where the impossible is made possible! at cern, the european title: Ingénieur-e de Protection (réseau HT) 80- 100%
description: about the job nous sommes la société valaisanne appelée à devenir le leader suisse de la production hydroélectrique. avec plus de 130 collaboratrices et collaborateurs hautement qualifiés, nous contribuons activement à la transition énergétique et à la sécurité d'approvisionnement en électricité 100 % renouvelable, décarbonée et indigène au service du valais et de la suisse. afin d’étoffer son département réseaux, fmv sa recherche une ou un ingénieur-e de protection (réseau ht) 80- 100% votre mission vous participez activement au développement et à la conception des systèmes de protection du réseau 65?kv. vous assurez l’installation et le bon fonctionnement des protections des lignes, des jeux de barres, des transformateurs ainsi que des relais de délestage. également, vous intervenez sur les systèmes de régulation de tension des transformateurs. votre rôle inclut l’analyse des dérangements et la localisation des perturbations, ainsi que la participation aux projets et aux travaux de maintenance liés aux installations de protection et aux systèmes de régulation des transformateurs. votre profil vous êtes titulaire d'un bachelor hes d’ingénieur en électricité ou d’un diplôme d’une formation jugée équivalente. vous avez une expérience de plusieurs années dans le domaine de l’énergie ou de l’industrie expérience dans le domaine des réseaux ht/mt (haute / moyenne tension) un atout vous avez des connaissances des automates industriels et de la tbt (très basse tension) vous démontrez des capacités d’organisation vous avez le sens des responsabilités, vous faites preuve d’initiative vous êtes dynamique et flexible ; vous appréciez le travail en équipe vous êtes de langue maternelle française ou allemande avec de bonnes connaissances orales de la deuxième langue et de l’anglais (min b1). pourquoi nous rejoindre ? une équipe ouverte et soudée se réjouit de collaborer avec vous. nous travaillons dans une ambiance agréable et dynamique. votre taux d'occupation est de 80 à 100% et votre lieu de travail principal est chalais. nous offrons à nos collaborateurs et collaboratrices également : flexibilité et équilibre : temps de travail annualisé, 41 heures de travail hebdomadaire, home-office possible en fonction des activités. conditions attractives : 5 semaines de congés, 14 jours fériés, 13e salaire, primes de jubilé chaque 5 ans, part variable sur des objectifs collectifs. avantages sociaux : cotisations préférentielles à la caisse de pension, remboursement cff ½ tarif, prise en charge des cotisations aux assurances accidents et d’indemnités journalières maladie. développement professionnel : soutien à la formation, formations continues et perspectives de carrière à long terme. postulez dès maintenant ! envoyez votre candidature via jobup sous "postuler rapidement". nous nous réjouissons de vous lire ! des questions ? contactez les ressources humaines de fmv au 027 327 45 46 ou par e-mail à écrire un email .

title: Ingénieur.e polyvalent.e orienté.e Outils métiers & Data 60 – 100%
description: about the job systéa est un bureau d’étude basé à monthey . fondée en 2020, l’entreprise est une petite structure résolument tournée vers ses clients. nous intervenons dans les domaines des transports publics, des services industriels, de l’énergie et de la digitalisation, au travers de projets variés et motivants. nous offrons à nos collaborateurs : 5 semaines de vacances par an 11 fériés annuels (soit 2 jours de plus que les jours fériés officiels du canton du valais) des prestations sociales compétitives un cadre de travail particulièrement agréable : des bureaux lumineux, un grand jardin, et une situation idéale à proximité des commodités (commerces, transports publics, parking) afin de compléter notre équipe technique, nous recherchons un.e ingénieur.e polyvalent.e orienté.e outils métiers & data 60 – 100% missions principales : amoa / déploiement de solutions métiers participer à la sélection et au déploiement de solutions métiers (gmao, gestion d’actifs, outils de pilotage) ; contribuer à la rédaction des livrables projet (cahier des charges fonctionnels et techniques, spécification, guide d’utilisateur) ; accompagner les phases de recette fonctionnelle, de mise en service et de stabilisation ; assurer la coordination des chantiers (y compris mise à jour des documents de chantier et suivi des actions). administration fonctionnelle administrer et paramétrer la plateforme : création / modification d’équipements, utilisateurs, rôles, workflows, terminaux mobiles, … ; garantir la cohérence fonctionnelle de la configuration (règles métiers, droits, processus). gouvernance & qualité des données définir et maintenir des standards afin de garantir la qualité, la fiabilité et la cohérence des données (actifs, interventions, historiques, stocks, pièces détachées) ; participer aux opérations d’import/export, contrôles, nettoyage et consolidation des données ; mettre en place des règles de structuration des référentiels (nomenclature équipements, familles, localisations, etc.). support et accompagnement des utilisateurs / clients former et accompagner les utilisateurs, produire et faire évoluer les supports d’utilisation ; assurer un service de support fonctionnel auprès des clients (diagnostic, résolution, escalade si nécessaire) ; être référent·e sur les bonnes pratiques d’usage et contribuer à la montée en compétence des utilisateurs. amélioration continue & veille technologique proposer des axes d’amélioration (mobilité terrain, automatisation, alertes, bi, iot, etc.) ; participer à l’évolution des outils et des processus internes ; contribuer à des réflexions autour de la valorisation des données et des usages avancés (automatisation, ia, etc.). profil recherché : formation bachelor technique minimum exigé (informatique, data, industrie, énergie, transports, maintenance ou domaine équivalent). expérience minimum 3 ans d’expérience dans un environnement orienté : outils métiers saas / cloud (gmao, erp, gestion d’actifs, etc.) ; traitement, structuration ou qualité de données ; support fonctionnel ou déploiement de solutions. compétences attendues très bonne capacité à structurer, fiabiliser et exploiter des données ; bonne compréhension des outils métiers ; excellente rigueur et sens de l’organisation ; très bon relationnel client et sens du service ; capacité à rédiger des documents clairs (procédures, supports, livrables) ; autonomie progressive et capacité à gérer plusieurs sujets en parallèle ; permis de conduire et véhicule. atouts supplémentaires (bonus) expérience sur une gmao ; compétences en reporting / bi (excel, power bi, etc.) ; notions sql ou logique base de données ; intérêt pour l’automatisation et les outils ia (llm) appliqués aux métiers. lieu de travail : monthey, télétravail à discuter entrée en fonction : dès que possible, à convenir candidature : merci d’envoyer cv, lettre de motivation, copie de diplômes et certificats. il ne sera répondu qu'aux postulations correspondant au profil requis. rejoindre systéa, c’est intégrer une équipe engagée, agile et orientée résultats, où expertise rime avec convivialité.

title: Expert Microsoft Fabric Consultant

responsibility design and implement modern data architectures using microsoft fabric build scalable lakehouse and medallion architectures (bronze / silver / gold) develop and industrialize data ingestion and transformation pipelines using data pipeline, spark and notebooks implement real-time and streaming data solutions using event streams, eventhouse and modern event-driven patterns design and optimize semantic models, datasets and performance for power bi analytics workloads implement governance, security and data management practices (access control, lineage, data quality, compliance) define best practices, architecture standards and platform operating models lead technical workshops, architecture reviews, and design sessions with stakeholders support dataops practices including ci/cd, monitoring, observability and cost/performance optimization mentor data engineers, analysts, and platform teams contribute to platform modernization, legacy migration and development of data platforms or modern data architecture strong expertise in microsoft fabric and azure data ecosystem solid hands-on experience with spark, sql, and python deep understanding of lakehouse, data warehouse and modern data platform architecture patterns experience building scalable and reliable data pipelines (batch and streaming) strong knowledge of power bi semantic modeling, performance optimization and governance understanding of data governance, security and dataops best practices ability to work in complex enterprise environments and translate business needs into technical solutions experience with azure services (e.g. adls, synapse, databricks, purview, event hub, functions) experience with event-driven and streaming architectures experience migrating legacy data warehouses to modern lakehouse/fabric platforms is a plus what we offer you: a community of experts - as digital natives, we put innovation at the heart of our expertise. we may work with tomorrow's drive and lead them in their digital transformation challenges and business strategies in key digital domains, including cloud, customer experience, digital workspace and data & ai. as an agile and fast-moving digital business partner, the business line offers trusted end-to-end solutions and products that help businesses in a wide range of industries in the private and public sector transform their operations, enhance customer experience, and drive growth. with our digital expertise, we are a strategic partner of orange business objectives to be a leading network and digital integrator with our team as a key growth engine. the process: we screen applications on an ongoing basis, with the aim of conducting conversations and interviews as we receive them. interested but feel that you don't match the criteria 100%? we encourage you to apply anyway! your perfect match might be the next job we are announcing, so why not have a head start and apply now! apply now: we can't wait to meet you! more about orange business: check out our career site for even more information or connect with us on linkedin .

title: Ingénieur Intégration – Data
description: about the job le département transformation digitale et systèmes d’information (tdsi) mène plusieurs initiatives stratégiques visant à améliorer la performance et l’efficacité de l’entreprise. dans ce contexte, nous recherchons un(e) ingénieur intégration – data (h/f/x) – 80% pour renforcer notre équipe. vos missions : en tant qu’ingénieur intégration – data, vous serez responsable du maintien et de l’évolution de la solution interne de génération de données synthétiques utilisée dans les environnements de test. vous jouerez un rôle essentiel dans la réduction de l’utilisation des données de production, en collaboration avec les équipes de test, les équipes techniques et les programmes projets. votre rôle : • maintenir et faire évoluer la codebase python de génération et d’injection de données synthétiques. • développer des modules d’intégration vers divers systèmes : apis internes, bus de données, systèmes legacy. • concevoir, enrichir et ajuster les constellations de données synthétiques selon les besoins des projets. • assurer la stabilité et l’opérationnalité du pipeline de données. • contribuer à la documentation, aux bonnes pratiques et à l’amélioration continue de la plateforme. • collaborer avec les équipes projets afin d’adapter la génération de données à leurs apis et contraintes techniques. • challenger l’architecture existante et proposer des optimisations. • servir de backup technique ponctuel sur les sujets transverses liés aux données synthétiques. ingénieur intégration – data votre profil : • diplôme d’ingénieur en informatique (epf, hes) ou équivalent. • expérience : profil junior à mid , avec expérience en développement python dans un contexte d’intégration • minimum 2 ans d’expérience en tant qu’ingénieur logiciel ou rôle similaire • autonomie, initiative et capacité à organiser votre travail de manière fiable • communication claire, pragmatisme et capacité à interagir avec des équipes multiples • maîtrise de l’anglais (b2 min) à l’oral et à l’écrit • présence physique à lausanne (2 jours par semaine min) compétences indispensables : • minimum de 2 ans d'expérience en environnement agile • maîtrise de python et bonnes bases d’architecture logicielle • expérience d’intégration avec apis rest/soap et systèmes externes compétences apportant un plus : • connaissance d’un bus de messages (kafka ou équivalent) • maîtrise des outils git et des workflows collaboratifs (branches, pr, reviews) • atouts : expérience en données synthétiques ou anonymisation, notions rgpd, sens du risque, expérience en tant que qa/testeur ou rôle similaire. • maîtrise du français (b2 min) à l’oral et à l’écrit. si vous vous reconnaissez dans ce descriptif merci de nous faire parvenir votre candidature par email, (avec curriculum vitae, lettre de motivation, copie des certificats de travail et diplômes). nous nous réjouissons déjà de faire votre connaissance ! le poste étant basé à lausanne les candidatures locales sont privilégiées. travailler chez ids, c’est aussi… rejoindre une entreprise et une équipe pour qui l’entraide, le professionnalisme, l’engagement, la motivation et la bonne humeur sont essentiels et représentent bien plus qu’une simple adhésion à un lieu de travail. c’est intégrer un environnement où chaque membre joue un rôle important dans le succès collectif. nous attachons une grande valeur au professionnalisme, en mettant l’accent sur la qualité du travail et le respect des normes éthiques. l’engagement envers nos objectifs et projets est ce qui alimente notre dynamique, et nous encourageons chaque membre de notre équipe à s’investir pleinement dans son rôle. integraal data services est un employeur qui promeut l’égalité des chances. nous encourageons les candidatures de personnes de tous horizons et origines, nous valorisons la diversité et croyons en un environnement de travail inclusif, tout en respectant les lois et règlements en place. nous vous encourageons à postuler si vous répondez aux critères requis et à vérifier votre éligibilité en fonction de la réglementation en vigueur.

tes responsabilités : modernisation de la stack : participer activement à la transition des solutions d'hébergement vers une architecture orchestrée (kubernetes). abstraction & api-first : concevoir idéalement au travers de l’utilisation du framework laravel. maîtrise des api & microservices : capacité à concevoir des apis robustes, performantes et documentées. affinité infrastructure : tu conçois l'infrastructure comme un objet programmable. un + si tu as des connaissances en : l’expérience avec kubernetes , gitlab ci est un plus. l’expérience avec la gestion automatique de certificats ssl (acme /let's encrypt) la connaissance des environnements d’hébergement mutualisés est un plus les contributions open source ou les side projects sont appréciés tu aimes travailler en équipe, et fais preuve d’une communication positive la stack technique que l’on utilise : mariadb laravel redis grafana elasticsearch kubernetes grafana le poste : contrat à durée indéterminée taux d’occupation : 80 - 100% localisation : genève disponibilité : au plus vite les étapes du processus de recrutement : un premier entretien technique pour valider tes compétences un second entretien dans nos bureaux pourquoi infomaniak : fais partie d’une entreprise qui façonne un cloud éthique qui respecte la vie privée, l’humain et l’environnement. travaille chaque jour dans un cadre bienveillant, équilibré avec ta vie personnelle et extrêmement stimulant avec des personnes à la pointe de leur domaine qui sont engagées, à l’écoute et passionnées par ce qu’elles font. fais une véritable différence dans la vie de millions d’utilisateurs à travers le monde. chez infomaniak, nous sommes tous réunis par la sensation d’avoir de réelles responsabilités et de contribuer à quelque chose de plus grand. rencontre des personnes diversifiées dans un climat convivial lors de sorties d’entreprise très régulières (afterwork, ski, sortie vélo, théâtre, etc.). évolue dans un climat très agréable et dans un cadre de travail original, où les salles de réunion sont décorées avec soin et qui favorisent l'inspiration ainsi que la collaboration. profite de nombreux autres avantages comme une prime annuelle incitant à la mobilité douce, une salle de fitness pour te maintenir en forme, la mise à disposition de vélos et trottinettes électriques, des espaces de détente conviviaux (salle de repos, jeux vidéos et d’arcade, flipper, babyfoot, etc.), une excellente couverture accident et perte de gain, et d’autres surprises encore. chez infomaniak, nous nous engageons en faveur de la diversité, de l'équité et de l'inclusion des collaborateurs·trices sur le lieu de travail. nos offres d'emploi sont ouvertes à tous·tes et tous les dossiers de candidatures sont évalués sur un pied d'égalité, qu'importe le genre, l'origine, la religion, l'orientation sexuelle ou le handicap des candidat·e·s.

title: Ingénieur-e en électricité

hydroélectriques d’une puissance installée d’environ 22% du parc hydroélectrique suisse (25% avec le pompage). ensemble, ces aménagements produisent près de 16% de l’énergie hydroélectrique suisse. grâce à notre savoir-faire unique, nous proposons des prestations à haute valeur ajoutée répondant aux besoins variés de nos clients, ainsi qu’aux standards de qualité les plus exigeants. notre portefeuille de services s’adresse aux entreprises électriques, aux collectivités publiques, aux entreprises de transport de même qu’aux industries. nous sommes principalement actifs en suisse et intervenons ponctuellement à l’étranger. ingénieur-e en électricité lieu de travail : sion votre mission : vous assurez la réalisation de projets d’étude et de renouvellement, ainsi que des expertises dans le domaine de la haute tension et du courant fort. vous garantissez l’ingénierie pour la maintenance des postes électriques, des transformateurs et des installations bt dans les aménagements hydroélectriques. vos responsabilités : elaborer et réaliser des projets complets et complexes dans le domaine des postes électriques ht-mt-bt de la phase d’avant projet à la phase d’exploitation proposer et réaliser des améliorations techniques pour optimiser l’exploitation des installations assurer le support technique aux responsables de maintenance des divers aménagements hydroélectriques etablir et actualiser les plans de maintenance et d’investissement elaborer les offres techniques et établir les budgets organiser et coordonner des chantiers et effectuer les mises en service des installations tenir à jour la documentation technique des aménagements vos compétences : ingénieur·e epf ou hes en génie électrique 5 ans d’expérience dans le domaine des postes électriques ou des transformateurs expérience confirmée dans la réalisation des études et dans l’acquisition des composants électriques en haute et moyenne tension expérience dans des mises en service capacité d’organisation et de prise de décision, nécessaires à la gestion simultanée de plusieurs projets autonomie et sens des responsabilités langue maternelle française ou allemande avec de très bonnes connaissances de l’autre langue nous offrons des conditions de travail attractives et une ambiance agréable, soutenues par des valeurs d’entreprise. dans un environnement stimulant, vous avez la possibilité de contribuer au fonctionnement et au développement d’hydro. si ce défi vous intéresse, faites-nous parvenir votre dossier de candidature complet (lettre de motivation, cv, diplômes, attestations) via notre portail en ligne qui sera traité de manière confidentielle. délai : 29 mars 2026. pour plus d'informations, le team rh se tient à votre disposition : écrire un email

title: AI Engineer
description: about the job orange business digital services switzerland is looking for a driven and experienced ai engineer to join our ai team in geneva! ai engineer the team, role & mission are you ready to transform your passion for ai into smart, scalable solutions? orange business digital services switzerland is looking for a driven and experienced ai engineer to join our ai team! do you enjoy working with the latest technologies in machine learning, deep learning, llms, ai modeling and implementation, especially in the cloud? then we'd love to meet you! as an ai engineer at orange business, you'll work on challenging projects with leading clients, applying (gen)ai to accelerate business processes, automate insights, and enable new forms of interaction. think of developing machine learning systems, intelligent agents, and integrating llms into existing systems. you'll be part of a multidisciplinary team of data scientists, engineers, and ai specialists focused on innovation, knowledge sharing, and impact. this is your chance to lead the way in a rapidly evolving ai landscape! the ai team is a new team within orange, consisting of a close-knit group of specialists whose goal is to take ai to the next level for both orange and our customers. we combine our expertise in data science, engineering, machine learning, and cloud to develop innovative solutions with real impact. your core responsibilities as an ai engineer consultant: design, develop, and implement ai solutions-from predictive models to genai applications-that directly contribute to our customers' strategic objectives; collaborate with customers and partners to define, build, and deploy ai applications; build scalable ai pipelines and automate model training, validation, and deployment (mlops); perform in-depth data analysis and feature engineering to support model development; apply current ai techniques and trends, such as generative ai, llm integrations, or computer vision; monitor model performance and continuously improve based on real-time feedback and business objectives. what you bring to the table a bachelor's or master's degree in ai, data science, computer science, or another technical field, or equivalent practical experience. at least 3 years of experience as an ai engineer or in a similar role, with a proven track record of high-impact ai projects. in-depth knowledge of machine learning and/or deep learning frameworks such as tensorflow, pytorch, or scikit-learn. experience with generative ai, including tools and libraries such as hugging face transformers, openai apis, langchain, azure openai, or azure ai foundry. strong python skills and experience developing and maintaining ai models. experience setting up scalable ai workflows and mlops processes, preferably with azure ml, ai foundry, or mlflow. understanding of data engineering concepts and experience with data preprocessing and model deployment in the cloud. familiarity with tools such as git, azure devops, or gitlab. excellent communication skills in french and english. german is a plus. what we offer you: a hybrid way of working with access to our modern office in geneva . we work with the latest technologies and are a people-focused organization with an open and inclusive culture that empowers everyone to reach their full potential. a community of experts - our digital natives put innovation at the heart of everything they do, and you will too! in addition to a competitive base salary, we offer you a mobility allowance, a bonus, a competitive swiss pension (lpp/bvg), and more . about orange business orange business is a leading network and digital integrator with offices in 65 countries worldwide and is part of the orange group. digital services, a business line of orange business, is a newly established division within orange business. in europe, the business line consists of approximately 1,500 people across 9 countries. we are digital natives, with innovation at the heart of our business, making us a reliable partner close to our customers. our shared mission is to help them innovate, ignite, and lead their digital transformation challenges and business strategies in key digital domains, including cloud, customer experience, and data & ai. as a flexible and agile digital business partner, the business line offers trusted end-to-end solutions and products that help companies across a wide range of industries in both the private and public sectors transform their operations, improve customer experience, and drive growth. with our digital expertise, we are a strategic partner in orange business's goals to be a leading network and digital integrator, with our team as a key driver of growth. the process we continuously screen applications, aiming to conduct interviews as soon as we receive them. interested but feel you don't quite meet the criteria? we encourage you to apply anyway! we believe in the potential of diverse skills, perspectives, and individuality. we want to encourage everyone to be themselves, and your unique capabilities could perfectly align with the needs of our team! your perfect match might just be the next vacancy we announce, so why not get ahead of the game and apply now! want to learn more about orange business? visit our website or follow us on linkedin. apply now: we can't wait to meet you! more about orange business: check out our career site for even more information or connect with us on linkedin .

title: Lead Back-End Engineer - TypeScript/Rust
description: about the job lead backend engieneer - web3 infrastructure (typescript & rust) location: lausanne, switzerland | work setup: hybrid (2 days remote/week) type: permanent | start date: flexible | workload: 80-100% are you a backend engineer passionate about building performant, scalable systems and eager to explore cutting-edge technologies in the web3 space? we're looking for a lead backend developer to join a fast-growing defi project backed by a highly technical team and a strong crypto-native vision. lead back-end engineer - typescript/rust your mission - lead a team of 4 talented backend engineers across various web3 backend projects - architect and implement high-reliability backend services (using typescript & rust) that support core blockchain-enabled products. - build apis, data pipelines, and internal tooling to streamline platform scalability and performance. - lead the full development lifecycle"”from system design to testing, deployment, monitoring, and maintenance. - collaborate cross-functionally with engineering and product teams to ensure consistent, secure, and robust system behavior. - contribute to ci/cd pipelines and devops automation. - continuously improve code quality, performance benchmarks, and developer experience. tech environment - core stack: typescript (node.js-based microservices), rust (growing footprint) - web3 / smart contracts: solidity (evm), hardhat, multi-chain deployments (eth, bsc, arbitrum, etc.) - api / data: graphql, apollo, nosql, redis - infra & devops: aws, docker/kubernetes, terraform, github actions, ci/cd, monitoring with prometheus & grafana - frontend: react, tailwindcss - culture: clean code, code reviews, test coverage, end-to-end ownership, pragmatic use of new tech what you bring - must-have: strong experience in backend engineering with typescript in production environments. - solid understanding of system architecture, microservices, containerized infrastructure and web3 products. - interest in rust and motivation to upskill in a web3/rust-native ecosystem. - familiarity with modern devops tools and ci/cd practices. - excellent communication skills in both english and french. - proven ability to thrive in fast-paced, iterative environments with a high degree of autonomy. bonus points - prior exposure to defi or blockchain technologies. - experience with protocol integrations or backend systems interacting with smart contracts. - understanding of high-availability systems and performance optimization. why join - work on impactful web3 infrastructure projects with real-world traction. - join a lean, collaborative team with deep technical experience and crypto-native culture. - enjoy flexible work hours, 2 remote days per week, and an agile work environment. - competitive compensation and benefits aligned with your seniority.

title: Systems Engineer
description: about the job epfl, the swiss federal institute of technology in lausanne, is one of the most dynamic university campuses in europe and ranks among the top 20 universities worldwide. the epfl employs more than 6,500 people supporting the three main missions of the institution: education, research and innovation. the epfl campus offers an exceptional working environment at the heart of a community of more than 17,000 people, including over 12,500 students and 4,000 researchers from more than 120 different countries. systems engineer mission as a systems engineer at epfl's school of engineering (sti), you will enable and support research, education, and innovation on global scale. acting as a 3rd-level expert, you will drive automation, modern infrastructure approaches, and improved application deployment standards, working closely with skilled peers to deliver robust, scalable services with real scientific impact. you will work across linux and windows server environments, vmware virtualisation, nas storage provisioning, and automation using ansible and gitlab, while also operating software license services and addressing complex accreditation and access control issues. main duties and responsibilities implement site reliability engineering (sre) principles, emphasizing reliability, automation, and sustainable service operation, through strong observability, clear ownership, and the systematic reduction of toil manage epfl-wide shared storage services for sti, including access management and service enablement for research laboratories and institutional units design and improve application deployment workflows, supported by a robust, scalable server and virtualisation infrastructure expert-level consulting to resolve complex issues, proposing sustainable, long-term infrastructure and platform solutions for sti units manage software license services, ensuring reliable and compliant access for sti users offer expertise on data storage architectures, backup strategies, access control, and best practices provide as the technical reference for accreditation and access control within the school of engineering act as an escalation point for complex incidents, including it security and compliance-related inquiries. act as a link between sti and epfl's central it, promoting close collaboration and strategic delivery of it infrastructure and services. profile who you are: have completed higher education in computer science (hes "” epfl) or possess practically equivalent training / experience a team player who enjoys working across teams and supporting a diverse community of researchers, engineers, and stakeholders methodical and solution-focused, with strong attention to detail in operating and evolving complex it systems a clear and confident communicator, fluent in spoken and written french and english (minimum level b2), able to engage with both technical and non-technical audiences at least 5 years of hands-on experience in system or infrastructure engineering within complex and heterogenous it environments hands-on experience with devops and infrastructure as code (iac) approaches and tools, particularly ansible strong programming skills, including python, shell scripting, and powershell: be able to write software proficiency in the three main operating systems: windows, macos, and linux experience with virtualisation and container technologies, in production or research environments strong knowledge of software license management experience working with it governance, security, and compliance requirements solid experience handling large datasets, and working with common storage access protocols practical experience with data centre infrastructure, including racks, servers, networking equipment, and hardware lifecycle operations proficiency in configuration management and ci/cd pipelines supporting infrastructure and application deployments thorough understanding of the osi network model nice-to-haves: experience working in a research and/or educational context, particularly with data-intensive workloads previous experience providing technical leadership, mentoring colleagues, or coordinating infrastructure initiatives certifications in project management / track record of leading complex deployment and migration assignments understanding and knowledge of swiss and european data protection laws and related, swiss legislative framework we offer additional info: the duty station for this position is epfl's campus at ecublens, lausanne. occasional travel may be required to other epfl campuses (travel is compensated). perks & benefits: a dynamic, interdisciplinary and multicultural work environment opportunities for professional growth, technical ownership, and long-term infrastructure development flexible working hours please submit your cv and cover letter in french or in english via the epfl recruitment portal. this job posting will be kept online until the position has been filled. informations contract start date : 06/01/2026 activity rate : 100,00 contract type: cdi reference: 2046

serveurs mutualisés, clouds managés ou encore conteneurisés dans la toute dernière version de l’infrastructure. nous avons plusieurs centaines de milliers de sites clients hébergés sur ces infrastructures pour des millions de visiteurs quotidiens. profil recherché : 4 - 5 ans d’expérience personnelle ou professionnelle dans l’administration de systèmes linux, de préférence dans cadre bienveillant, équilibré avec ta vie personnelle et extrêmement stimulant avec des personnes à la pointe de leur domaine qui sont engagées, à l’écoute et passionnées par ce qu’elles font. fais une véritable différence dans la vie de millions d’utilisateurs à travers le monde. chez infomaniak, nous sommes tous réunis par la sensation d’avoir de réelles responsabilités et de contribuer à quelque chose de plus grand. rencontre des personnes diversifiées dans un climat convivial lors de sorties d’entreprise très régulières (afterwork, ski, sortie vélo, théâtre, etc.). évolue dans un climat très agréable et dans un cadre de travail original, où les salles de réunion sont décorées avec soin et qui favorisent l'inspiration ainsi que la collaboration. profite de nombreux autres avantages comme une prime annuelle incitant à la mobilité douce, une salle de fitness pour te maintenir en forme, la mise à disposition de vélos et trottinettes électriques, des espaces de détente conviviaux (salle de repos, jeux vidéos et d’arcade, flipper, babyfoot, etc.), une excellente couverture accident et perte de gain, et d’autres surprises encore. chez infomaniak, nous nous engageons en faveur de la diversité, de l'équité et de l'inclusion des collaborateurs·trices sur le lieu de travail. nos offres d'emploi sont ouvertes à tous·tes et tous les dossiers de candidatures sont évalués sur un pied d'égalité, qu'importe le genre, l'origine, la religion, l'orientation sexuelle ou le handicap des candidat·e·s.
