degree in engineering or project management. strong analytical skills and creativity in problem-solving required. excellent communication skills and a client-focused mindset essential. is this helpful? about the job company description european leader in management consulting for business and it departments of major luxury houses and retail brands, adone carries out strategic and operational missions on e-commerce, data, customer experience, digital in store, pim-dam, plm, supply chain or green transition projects. the firm advises its clients on their projects independently to guide them in their technological choices and business transformation projects. from our headquarters in paris and our subsidiaries in geneva, london, and milan, our consultants are driven by internal values of excellence, pragmatism, and integrity. they are encouraged to develop their expertise, creativity, and sense of initiative to contribute to the firm's evolution. job description integrated within an adone team, at one of our clients, you participate in the delivery of our missions. your main tasks: taking charge of a digital solution, participating in the definition of new processes, monitoring developments, performing simple configuration, participating in testing phases, maintaining solutions in good working condition (reporting and analyzing anomalies), supporting users, leading training sessions, creating and/or updating training materials qualifications with an engineering degree or a bac +5 university curriculum with a focus on is and/or amoa project management, you are looking for a final year internship and want to discover the consulting world… you have developed very good analytical skills, an ability to quickly grasp complex issues, and show creativity in finding solutions; you are interested in the agile method and open to learning it; serious, tenacious, and rigorous, you know how to work in a team and adapt to different situations; you have excellent interpersonal skills, enjoy developing client relationships, and strive for excellence; your open-mindedness and commitment will be the keys to successfully completing your missions. you speak fluent english. this internship is available for a period of 6 months starting from september and may lead to a permanent contract . additional information 🤩 our benefits: within adone conseil, we do our best to ensure the fulfillment of our employees and help them progress in their careers. here are some benefits: progress and develop your career: a personalized onboarding path, a wide range of in-person and online training courses, varied client missions… create connections and feel good at adone: sports sessions, cultural outings, internal games and activities, afterworks and events… #li-hybrid enrich your expertise: join one of our practices, benefit from project feedback, pitches, dedicated webinars… 🏊 dive into the adone culture: want to know more? discover adone from the inside below! discover everything that makes adone a best place to work discover our tools to help you develop your career discover our internal programs discover our many videos: employee testimonials, events, greeting cards, our premises… want to join us? do not hesitate to apply so that a member of the recruitment team can review your profile and contact you. 🚀 we seek diverse profiles and are committed to conducting non-discriminatory recruitment processes.

title: Advisory Solution Consultant - German Speaking
description: job summary show moveworks is an ai platform revolutionizing workforce efficiency. tasks support employee experience, customer workflow, itx solution sales. guide revenue growth and collaborate with sales and product teams. deliver product demos and conduct technical workshops for clients. skills 5+ years in pre-sales consulting, expertise in cloud architecture. strong understanding of restful apis and cloud solutions. ability to collaborate across teams and manage sales pipelines. is this helpful? about the job company description moveworks is the agentic ai assistant platform that empowers the entire workforce. our platform enables employees to converse with all of their business systems through natural language to quickly find answers and automate tasks. powered by the world's most advanced llms, our proprietary models, and a sophisticated agentic ai platform, we're transforming how work gets done by allowing ai to take initiative, streamline complex workflows, and continuously learn and adapt. moveworks is trusted by over 5.5 million employees at more than 350 of the world’s largest companies, including 10% of the fortune 500, to automate everyday tasks and streamline business operations. recognized on the forbes cloud 100 and ai 50 lists, moveworks was also named one of fast company’s 2025 most innovative companies and inc’s best in business, in the best in innovation category. moveworks was also recognized at microsoft’s 2025 partner of the year and in 2024, received the ai breakthrough award. in december 2025, moveworks was acquired by servicenow, marking a pivotal milestone in our journey to create a single front door to work for all business systems. by combining servicenow’s leading workflow automation with moveworks’ reasoning engine and natural language capabilities, we deliver the ai platform for every person and every workflow. built to go beyond basic summaries to deliver meaningful business impact. together, our ai acts across enterprise systems to turn conversations into completed work. by joining our team, you’ll be at the forefront of the ai transformation, backed by the global scale of servicenow and the agility of a high-growth company. we are looking for world-class talent to help us extend agentic ai to every employee across every corner of the business. it all started in sunny san diego, california in 2004 when a visionary engineer, fred luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. fast forward to today — servicenow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative ai-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the fortune 500®. our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. but this is just the beginning of our journey. join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone. job description as a member of our solution consulting team, you will have a major impact on our future success by supporting [employee experience, customer workflow, itx] solution sales. you will guide revenue for one of our products with the support and partnership of sales, product management, and the executive team. this is a hands-on technical consultant who can go wide and deep on solution delivery and solution positioning during sales cycles. what you get to do in this role: the moveworks advisory solution consultant is a technical & business consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide industry and product specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory. partner closely with servicenow account executives as the moveworks product, ai, and domain expert, supporting complex sales cycles and driving deal strategy across one or more industries. lead customer discovery sessions and workshops to understand business challenges, technical environments, and success criteria, aligning moveworks capabilities to customer needs and outcomes. deliver compelling, persona- and value-based product demonstrations that “explain by showing” how moveworks and servicenow together automate work and improve employee experiences. facilitate technical and architectural workshops covering moveworks’ ai/ml approach, integrations, security, and platform architecture, in the context of the customer’s servicenow environment. partner with business value services to build data-driven business cases, prioritize use cases, and articulate measurable roi using reports, calculators, and insights. define customer success criteria and lead the design, execution, and management of end-to-end proof-of-concept engagements. develop trusted relationships with customer stakeholders and client partners, guiding strategic programs such as roadmap alignment, customer journey mapping, and outcome planning in top accounts. collaborate cross-functionally to ensure a smooth transition from pre-sales to post-sales by documenting requirements and facilitating a clean handoff to customer success teams. provide continuous feedback to product management on customer needs, competitive insights, and market trends to help influence product direction and strategy. stay current on competitive positioning and market differentiation, clearly articulating moveworks’ value within the broader servicenow ecosystem. contribute to team excellence by sharing best practices, reusable assets, and continuously improving demos, presentations, and sales processes to be more scalable and impactful. support field and marketing initiatives, including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and industry events. qualifications to be successful in this role you have: strong understanding of cloud architecture and restful apis, with the ability to leverage self-service tools and configurators to demonstrate “art of the possible” solutions and connect to customer pre-production environments. familiarity with rpa, ipaas, and low-code/no-code platforms; scripting or coding experience is a plus for building prototypes, custom use cases, and integrations. 5+ years of experience in pre-sales solution consulting or sales engineering roles supporting enterprise application platforms. experience in enterprise industries such as technology or telecommunications is preferred. proficiency with the servicenow platform or deep technical experience with other enterprise cloud software solutions. demonstrated ability to collaborate cross-functionally with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services teams. strong territory and pipeline management skills, with experience partnering closely with sales counterparts to drive consistent execution. willingness to travel approximately 50% for customer meetings and internal events. fd21 additional information work title: (Senior) Network Engineer (all genders)
description: job summary show adesso stands for it excellence and offers great development opportunities. join a culture of growth, teamwork, and outstanding training benefits. tasks plan, operate, and optimize complex enterprise networks. ensure secure operation of firewalls and security solutions. collaborate closely with team members on customer projects. skills degree in it or similar with 5-6 years of relevant experience. deep knowledge in switching and routing technologies. experience with network security and firewalls. is this helpful? about the job adesso stands for it excellence and thus also for excellent development opportunities for all adessi. we grow together and learn from each other – on our projects, in the team, and with outstanding training offers. we have it at heart, keep an eye on the industry, and focus on the success of our customers. because successful business arises from innovative ideas, future-proof strategies, and smart it solutions. people who want to make a difference and simply get things done are always involved. we design and build software that excites our customers. in projects that challenge us. and that in an environment that is fun, where success is created together and everyone feels comfortable. what you can achieve networks are your home – from classic enterprise setups to modern sd-wan and sase architectures? you don’t just want to operate but actively develop, automate, and secure? then you fit perfectly into our team. network operation & architecture: you plan, operate, and optimize complex enterprise networks – from core to access layer. switching, routing, and segmentation are part of your daily routine, as is working with protocols and technologies like spanning tree, ospf, isis, bgp, vxlan, evpn, multicast, or qos. network security & firewalls: you take technical responsibility for building, configuring, and securely operating firewall and security solutions – including those based on fortinet and versa networks. you ensure clean segmentation, policies, and secure transitions between network zones. multi-vendor environments: you feel comfortable in heterogeneous network landscapes and work confidently with solutions from various manufacturers such as cisco, fortinet, versa networks, or f5. you recognize when each stack plays to its strengths – and integrate the components into a stable overall platform. teamwork & collaboration: you work closely with colleagues from engineering, regularly exchange best practices, and support knowledge building within the team. customer focus & collaboration: you take technical responsibility in customer projects – from requirements analysis through design and implementation to operation – and work closely with sales and manufacturer partners, e.g., in pre-sales phases (rfp, rfq). professional development: you help to further develop our engineering standards, share your knowledge (e.g., in internal workshops or whitepapers), and are a sought-after sparring partner for technical questions. how you succeed education & experience: you have a degree in it or a comparable technical qualification and bring at least five to six years of experience as a network or network security engineer – ideally in 2nd and 3rd level support as well as in project environments. network understanding: you have deep knowledge of switching and routing technologies and know relevant protocols such as spanning tree, ospf, isis, bgp, vxlan, evpn, multicast, and qos. network segmentation and secure architecture concepts are a matter of course for you. security & firewalls: you have practical experience with network security and firewalls – especially with solutions from f5, fortinet, and versa networks. ideally, you also have experience with f5 big-ip and nginx. sd-wan & campus networks: sd-wan is not just a term for you; you have already been involved in operation, rollout, or migration. experience in wireless and campus networks is a plus. automation & scripting mindset: you are confident with python or have a demonstrable interest in further developing your skills in this area. you bring a fundamental automation and "infrastructure-as-code" mindset. certifications: you have at least a current ccnp or fcp level or a comparable vendor certification – or are willing to obtain it soon. soft skills: you convince with analytical thinking, joy in complex troubleshooting, a clear, solution-oriented demeanor, and high service orientation towards our customers and colleagues. language skills: you communicate confidently in german (at least c1 level) and have good english skills – both written and spoken. opportunity provider - what makes adesso special our promise: you will feel comfortable with us! collegial, communal, and on equal footing – we live exchange, team spirit, and respectful interaction. diversity and different perspectives are valued just as much as you as a person. that and much more stands for our very special sense of "we." there is even a word for it: adessi. learn and grow with us: with over 400 training offers and our digital learning platform, we support your continuous development. experience real team spirit: joint events (e.g., sports weekend and the annual educamp training trip), welcome days, company runs strengthen our cohesion and make you part of the team from the start. engagement that is rewarded: your commitment pays off – with bonuses for referrals, presentations, supervision of theses, and attractive discounts via our corporate benefits portal. our culture and collaboration are characterized by mutual appreciation, recognition, and support. that connects us – even in the home office. part-time work is possible by arrangement (80-100%). we have been repeatedly voted one of the best employers in switzerland! our extensive training offer and a transparent career level model for all ensure that your development with us does not stand still. because growing together and being an opportunity provider is programmed in our dna. contact you will like it with us! apply now directly online. adesso schweiz ag // recruiting // t +41 58 520 97 03 // career@adesso.ch #li-hybrid

title: Schutzingenieur/in (HS-Netz) 80-100%
description: about the job wir sind das walliser unternehmen, das zum schweizer marktführer in der wasserkraftproduktion wird. mit über 130 hochqualifizierten mitarbeitenden leisten wir einen aktiven beitrag zur energiewende und zur versorgungssicherheit mit 100% erneuerbarem, kohlenstofffreiem und einheimischem strom zum wohle des wallis und der schweiz. zur verstärkung der abteilung netze sucht die fmv eine oder einen schutzingenieur/in (hs-netz) 80-100% ihre mission sie beteiligen sich aktiv an der entwicklung und dem design von schutzsystemen für das 65-kv-netz. sie sorgen für die installation und das einwandfreie funktionieren der leitungsschutzvorrichtungen, der sammelschienen, der transformatoren sowie der lastabwurfrelais. außerdem arbeiten sie an den regelungssystemen der transformatoren, um deren leistung zu gewährleisten. zu ihren aufgaben gehört die analyse von störungen und die lokalisierung von störungen sowie die mitwirkung an projekten und wartungsarbeiten im zusammenhang mit schutzanlagen und regelungssystemen der transformatoren. ihr profil sie sind im besitz eines hes-bachelors in elektrotechnik oder eines diploms mit einer gleichwertigen ausbildung sie haben einige jahre erfahrung im energie- oder industriesektor erfahrung im bereich hoch- und mittelspannungsnetze (hs/ns) ist von vorteil sie verfügen über kenntnisse in industrieautomation und niederspannung sie zeigen organisationsfähigkeit sie haben verantwortungsbewusstsein und zeigen eigeninitiative sie sind dynamisch und flexibel; sie schätzen die arbeit im team ihre muttersprache ist deutsch oder französisch und sie verfügen über gute mündliche kenntnisse der zweiten sprache warum bei uns arbeiten ? ein offenes, eingespieltes und hilfsbereites team freut sich auf die zusammenarbeit mit ihnen. sie arbeiten in einem kollegialen und dynamischen arbeitsumfeld. ihr beschäftigungsgrad beträgt 80-100% und ihr arbeitsort ist chalais. wir bieten unseren mitarbeitenden und mitarbeitern zusätzlich: flexibilität und ausgewogenheit: annualisierte arbeitszeit, 41 stunden wöchentliche arbeit, home office möglich je nach aktivität. attraktive bedingungen: 5 wochen ferien, 14 feiertage, 13. gehalt, jubiläumsprämien alle 5 jahre, variabler teil basierend auf kollektiven zielen. sozialleistungen: vorzugsbeiträge an die pensionskasse, rückerstattung des halbtax-abos sbb, übernahme der beiträge an die unfallversicherung und krankentaggeld. berufliche entwicklung: unterstützung bei aus- und weiterbildung und langfristigen beruflichen perspektiven. bewerben sie sich jetzt! senden sie ihre bewerbung über jobup unter "schnell bewerben". wir freuen uns auf sie! noch fragen? kontaktieren sie die personalabteilung von fmv unter 027 327 45 46 oder per e-mail an e-mail schreiben .

1023 crissier écrire un email

title: Lead Engineer Identity and Access Management (all genders) 80-100%

about the job join axa, switzerland's leading insurance company - as your contribution your contribution conceptualization, design, and further development of resilient iam architectures and platforms in the enterprise environment responsibility for co-design in a broadly positioned iam: provisioning/deprovisioning, access governance, authorization, role and policy models in hybrid infrastructures technical and professional leadership: establish standards, best practices, and security-by-design; drive engineering in software, system, and security areas; mentoring, coaching, and teaching within the team moderate collaboration: co-create vision and strategy, find solutions together, and achieve decision-capable results innovation and roadmap: evaluate trends and new technologies, co-design ai powered solution delivery, plan meaningful adoption, and continuously keep a future-proof iam roadmap up to date your skills and talents your skills and talents very good architectural understanding and several years of architecture/engineering experience (software, system & security) with a pronounced security mindset solid iga/iam domain knowledge, familiar with iam and security solutions and enterprise iam in hybrid environments as well as solid authentication skills proven experience as a technical/professional lead, networked thinking, and the ability to bring together different teams and perspectives strong stakeholder management and negotiation skills, very good german and english skills high learning motivation, familiar with trends and new technologies, and motivated to always stay up to date apply now! motivation letter? we do without it. instead, we look forward to your answers to our short questions about the position in the online application tool. for data protection reasons, only applications submitted via the online application link will be considered. about axa every success story begins with believing in yourself. as axa, we see ourselves as a partner who stands by your side and believes in you. that is why we challenge and promote you and proactively show you opportunities for your future. we encourage you and offer you freedom so that you can connect the things that are important to you. together with your commitment and your individual contribution, this becomes a forward-looking partnership. for you, for us, and for our customers. and not just for the moment. but in the long term. write your own success story with us now. know you can.

title: IT Production Engineer – Scheduling / File Transfer / Monitoring (80-100%)
description: job summary show join lombard odier, a leading global asset manager focused on sustainable investments. experience a dynamic work environment with opportunities for growth. tasks monitor and operate production systems in hybrid environments. implement automation workflows using devops practices and scripting. contribute to cloud migration projects and ai-based initiatives. skills degree in computer science or similar; 0-4 years of relevant experience. knowledge of cloud platforms like azure and aws. familiarity with devops tools such as git and docker. is this helpful? about the job wer sich für eine karriere bei lombard odier entscheidet, ist für einen renommierten, globalen vermögensverwalter und asset manager tätig, der sich auf nachhaltige investitionen fokussiert. wir sind eine unabhängige und innovative bank erster wahl für private und institutionelle kunden. unsere gruppe ist eine der bestkapitalisierten weltweit. wir verwalten rund chf 300 milliarden und sind auf vier kontinenten von über 25 niederlassungen aus tätig. mit unserer über 225-jährigen geschichte sind wir ein investmenthaus mit umfassendem angebot an diskretionärer und beratender portfolioverwaltung sowie finanzdienstleistungen. unsere hochmoderne technologie-plattform vermarkten wir auch erfolgreich an andere finanzinstitute. über lombard odier investment managers bieten wir vermögensverwaltungsdienstleistungen und anlagestrategien an. "rethink everything" ist unsere philosophie – sie steht im zentrum unseres handelns. wir sind durch mehr als 40 finanzkrisen stärker geworden, indem wir die welt um uns herum ständig neu gedacht haben. so bieten wir unseren kundinnen und kunden stets neue anlageperspektiven. it production engineer – scheduling / file transfer / monitoring (80-100%) as part of the modernization of our it platform and the adoption of new technologies, we are looking for a junior production engineer eager to learn and grow in areas such as cloud, devops, and ai-driven automation. you will join a dynamic team of 7 engineers within the it operations department and contribute to the evolution of our production environment. the team is responsible for scheduling, file transfer and monitoring inside it delivery team your role operate and monitor production systems in a hybrid environment (on-premise and cloud). implement and automate workflows using devops practices (ci/cd pipelines, scripting). participate in cloud migration projects and help define best practices. contribute to ai-based initiatives for predictive monitoring and process optimization. provide level 2/3 support for production incidents and collaborate with technical teams. document processes and propose improvements for reliability and efficiency. internal contacts: production team (product-support, exploitation), integration team, infrastructure teams (databases, systems, networks), development teams, service management teams (incidents and problems) external contacts: cloud service providers, technology partners, and vendors your profile degree in computer science or equivalent. zero to 3-4 years of experience in a similar role knowledge of cloud platforms (azure, aws, or gcp). knowledge of devops tools (git, jenkins/gitlab ci, docker, kubernetes). knowledge of scripting (python, bash) and interest in automation. curiosity about ai technologies and their application in it operations. good analytical skills, willingness to learn, and team spirit. fluent in french and english (spoken and written). residence in switzerland or willingness to relocate. technical environment cloud: azure devops: git, azuredevops ci/cd, jenkins, docker, kubernetes automation & scripting: opcon, goanyhere, python, bash, powershell monitoring & observability: prometheus, grafana, servicenow event management ai & analytics: apis for predictive monitoring, anomaly detection tools infrastructure as code: terraform, ansible fünf werte definieren die dna unseres hauses . exzellenz motiviert uns, die besten unseres gebiets zu sein, und innovation ermöglicht unseren fortschritt. respekt ist das fundament unserer interaktionen, und integrität leitet unser handeln. gemeinsam sind wir one team , das sich mit leidenschaftlichem engagement in den dienst unserer kundinnen und kunden stellt. wir fördern eine inklusive und integrative arbeitsumgebung für unsere mitarbeitenden. vielfalt, gleichberechtigung und inklusion sind fest in unserem unternehmensleitbild ‘la maison’ verankert und wir sind bestrebt, dass unsere mitarbeitenden sowohl ihre beruflichen als auch ihre persönlichen ziele verwirklichen können. wir fördern interne karrierewege durch individualisierte und kompetenzbasierte trainingsangebote. wir sind fest davon überzeugt, dass der aufbau vielfältiger teams zu unserem nachhaltigen erfolg beiträgt und daher fundament unserer unternehmensstrategie ist. es ist eine tolle gelegenheit, um teil des teams zu werden. alle bewerbungen werden streng vertraulich behandelt.

title: Engineering Manager, Platform
description: job summary show join scandit as an engineering manager, platform! lead remotely in europe. tasks guide and grow a talented devops and sre team. enhance cloud infrastructure and ci/cd pipelines. drive cross-team initiatives for security and compliance. skills 5+ years leading teams in a cloud-native environment. strong project and program management skills. experienced in engaging with engineers at all levels. is this helpful? about the job engineering manager, platform ** this role can be based remotely in finland, switzerland, poland, uk, italy, or germany ** scandit gives people superpowers. whether enabling delivery drivers to make quicker deliveries, matching a patient with their medication, or allowing retailers to make store operations more efficient, our technology automates workflows and provides actionable insights to help businesses in a variety of industries. join us, as we continue to expand, grow and innovate, and help take scandit to the next level. about the role our platform engineering (devops & sre) team owns the cloud infrastructure and ci/cd pipeline ecosystem that the entire engineering organisation relies on. as engineering practices evolve, the team continuously looks for ways to improve efficiency and delivery speed — including making thoughtful use of modern tools, such as ai‑assisted workflows, to support clearer planning and faster execution within the team. we’re looking for an engineering manager to lead our platform engineering team. you’ll bring clarity, structure, and predictable execution, while guiding a talented team of devops and sre professionals. you’ll partner closely with product engineering teams, and you’ll embrace modern ai‑enabled tooling and practices to accelerate development and raise engineering effectiveness. this role also offers room for expanded scope as scandit grows, including opportunities to take on additional engineering initiatives or teams over time. what you will do lead, mentor, and grow your team. bring structure and clarity to planning, execution, and reporting. own the operation and continuous improvement of our cloud infrastructure and ci/cd pipelines. actively drive cross‑team initiatives in areas such as security and compliance (e.g. reducing snyk vulnerabilities, supporting iso-related efforts). strengthen security, reliability, and cost efficiency through disciplined processes, clear ownership, and consistent follow‑through. establish roadmaps, milestones, and progress reporting (e.g. okrs) to ensure stakeholders have visibility into plans, risks, and delivery. proactively collaborate with product and engineering teams to align priorities and successfully deliver shared initiatives. identify bottlenecks and lead improvements that increase engineering velocity. take on additional scope and cross‑team leadership as scandit continues to grow. who you are a structured, pragmatic engineering leader who brings clarity and predictability to complex work. strong in project and program management, stakeholder communication, and cross‑functional alignment. experienced in leading devops/sre or platform teams in a cloud‑native environment (aws, gcp, gitlab or similar). comfortable driving cross‑team initiatives and seeing them through to completion (e.g. security or compliance efforts). able to engage with engineers at all levels and provide broad technical guidance. experienced in leading distributed teams with strong communication practices. at least 3 years of software engineering experience and 5+ years leading teams. committed to high‑quality engineering practices and a people‑first leadership style. what we offer here are just some of the reasons why people choose to build their career at scandit: a highly skilled team and a fun environment where you can put your enthusiasm for cutting-edge technologies to use hackathons flexible, office, hybrid or home working people-first culture title: CAD/PLM Engineer (EN-IM-CEP-2026-33-GRAP)
company: CERN European Organization for Nuclear Research
description: job summary show join cern as an engineer in the information management group! contribute to digital engineering transformation and improve efficiency. tasks provide cad/plm expertise and resolve technical issues. ensure system performance for 5,000+ specialists by validating features. deliver training on digital engineering tools and collaborate with developers. skills master's with 2-6 years or phd with up to 3 years experience required. strong communication and problem-solving skills are essential. experience with 3d design platforms like catia v5 or siemens nx is a plus. is this helpful? about the job job description the engineering department is seeking a talented engineer to join the information management group and contribute to cern's digital engineering transformation. the team delivers the product lifecycle management (plm) system that manages millions of engineering assets and supports over 5,000 specialists. as part of the cad/plm service team, you'll focus on evolving cern's engineering tools into a connected digital ecosystem, improving efficiency and laying the foundation for future 3d digital twins. your responsibilities: provide hands-on cad/plm expertise, resolving technical issues and promoting best practices. ensure reliable system performance for 5,000+ specialists by validating new features. deliver training and workshops on digital engineering tools. translate user and organizational needs into functional requirements, collaborating with developers. streamline engineering document management within the digital thread. analyse next-generation use cases, including 3d digital twins and openusd-based pipelines with ai capabilities. this role includes team supervision responsibilities. your profile: hands-on experience with major 3d design platforms such as catia v5, siemens nx, ptc creo and/or autodesk revit, bricsys bricscad. experience with product/cad exchange formats as well as 3d visualisation standards (openusd) will be a plus. skills: business analysis: needs assessment, requirements gathering, process modelling. strong communication and problem-solving skills; experienced in troubleshooting complex issues. collaborative team player with mentoring and knowledge-sharing experience. familiarity with nvidia omniverse or similar 3d/virtual collaboration platforms would be a plus. spoken and written english or french, with a commitment to learn the basics of the other language. eligibility criteria: you are a national of a cern member or associate member state . you have a professional background in engineering (or a related field) and have either: a master's degree with 2 to 6 years of post-graduation professional experience; or a phd with no more than 3 years of post-graduation professional experience. you have never had a cern fellow or graduate contract before. additional information job closing date: 15.03.2026 at 23:59 cet. contract duration: 24 months, with a possible extension up to 36 months maximum. working hours: 40 hours per week job flexibility: hybrid target start date: 01-may-2026 this position involves: work during nights, sundays and official holidays, when required by the needs of the organization. job reference: en-im-cep-2026-33-grap field of work: mechanical engineering benchmark job: 200090 - mechanical engineer global benefits a monthly stipend between 6372-7004 swiss francs per month (tax free) depending on your degree. 30 days of paid leave per year plus 2 weeks annual closure. coverage by cern’s comprehensive health insurance scheme (for yourself, your spouse and children), and membership of the cern pension fund. family, child and infant monthly allowances depending on your individual circumstances. a relocation package (installation grant and travel expenses) depending on your individual circumstances. possibility to extend your contract up to 36 months. on-the-job and formal training including language classes. overview of cern - discover a world where the impossible is made possible! at cern, the european organization for nuclear research, we are pushing the frontiers of science and technology. our groundbreaking work brings together not only physicists but also a diverse range of professionals from engineering, technical, scientific, and administrative fields. together, we foster an environment where innovation and collaboration thrive. every day, we face exciting new challenges and opportunities to contribute to cutting-edge research that shapes our understanding of the universe. we meet these challenges through the diverse perspectives within our teams, ensuring every contribution is valued and driving our shared sense of inclusion and purpose. diversity is a core value of cern since its foundation, and it remains central to our mission and continued success. if you are ready to be part of a dynamic, inclusive community pushing the boundaries of knowledge, cern is the place where your curiosity and skills can thrive. be part of our mission to uncover what lies at the heart of the universe! take part! more information about us, here: careers.cern

title: Public Cloud Engineer 80-100% (a)
description: about the job deine arbeitsstelle bei axians amanox bauen wir nicht nur in der cloud - wir gestalten aktiv, wie moderne it-landschaften entstehen. unsere engineers arbeiten mit leidenschaft an smarten, skalierbaren cloud-lösungen. dabei denken wir einen schritt weiter: ob ai-basierte services, infrastructure as code oder continuous innovation. bei uns trifft neugier auf technologie und teamgeist auf tatkraft. be curious. inspire customers. live cloud. dieses tätigkeitsfeld begeistert dich konzeption, aufbau und weiterentwicklung moderner public-cloud-infrastrukturen entwicklung cloud-nativer architekturen mit fokus auf automation, skalierbarkeit und ai-integration aktive unterstützung unserer kunden bei der digitalisierung - von der idee bis zum laufenden betrieb übernahme der verantwortung für kundenprojekte und begleitung unsere kunden als verlässliche ansprechperson experimentieren und forschen in unseren lab-umgebungen mit raum für kreativität und technische tiefe mitwirken bei internen formaten (meetups, demos, tech talks, team challenges) sowie an externen events deine expertise ist gefragt technischer background in software engineering, cloud engineering oder vergleichbarem erfahrung mit iac (terraform, cdk, o.ä.), container-technologien und ci/cd erste berührungspunkte oder starkes interesse an ai-gestützten cloud services (z.b. aws bedrock, azure openai, ...) begeisterung für innovative ansätze und lust, neue wege zu gehen bei uns zählt deine persönlichkeit bist du dienstleistungsorientiert, flexibel sowie hilfsbereit, besitzt eine gewinnende persönlichkeit und bringst ein hohes mass an einsatzbereitschaft sowie eigenverantwortung mit? verfügst du über eine flexible und einsatzfreudige persönlichkeit, eine ausgeprägte kommunikationsstärke und bist hartnäckig in der lösung von problemen bei gleichzeitig hohem qualitätsbewusstsein? dann bist du in unserem interkulturellen team genau richtig. mit deiner strukturierten, selbstständigen und präzisen arbeitsweise sowie deiner motivierten haltung, dein wissen weiterzuvermitteln, unterstützt du unsere kunden sowie dein team, ohne dabei den spass an der täglichen arbeit zu verlieren. als zuverlässige:r, hilfsbereite:r teamplayer:in wirkst du aktiv mit und leistest einen wesentlichen beitrag zum gemeinsamen erfolg. wir haben viel zu bieten unsere kultur ist offen, transparent und wir kommunizieren im partnerschaftlichen «du» auf augenhöhe. deine ideen und innovationskraft sind willkommen, denn wir treffen unsere entscheidungen lokal - wie in einem kmu. dennoch musst du nicht auf die vorteile eines grossen unternehmens verzichten; axians ist teil des weltumspannenden vinci-konzerns mit annähernd 285'000 mitarbeitenden. unser versprechen «the best of ict with a human touch» halten wir konsequent ein und unsere grundwerte; eigenständigkeit, verantwortung, unternehmergeist, vertrauen und solidarität leiten unsere zusammenarbeit - lokal, national und international. erfolg braucht perspektiven in vielen disziplinen gehören wir zu den marktführern. unsere kunden vertrauen uns ihre wichtigen projekte an und unsere teams erbringen für sie dienstleistungen am puls der technologie - manchmal überregional oder sogar international. ein spannendes arbeitsumfeld ist dadurch gewährleistet. damit unsere teams selbst die anspruchsvollsten aufgaben erfolgreich lösen können, fördern wir gezielt die fachliche und persönliche weiterentwicklung jedes einzelnen. bei axians in der schweiz und innerhalb des vinci-konzerns stehen dir national und weltweit viele wege offen. deine weiteren vorteile bonusaktienprogramme für mitarbeitende des vinci konzerns attraktive vergütungen und sozialleistungen flexible arbeitsbedingungen programme zur persönlichen weiterbildung und entwicklung

title: Applied AI Engineer
description: about the job applied ai engineer werden sie teil unseres teams im geschäftszentrum «software engineering & it» in aarau. wir realisieren anspruchsvolle machine-learning- und ki-lösungen an der schnittstelle von software-engineering, modernen llm-technologien und kundendaten - von intelligenten assistenzsystemen über agentenbasierte anwendungen bis hin zu unternehmensweiten ki-plattformen. gestalten sie mit uns robuste, sichere und produktive ki-systeme, die echten mehrwert schaffen. tätigkeitsgebiet ihre hauptaufgaben und verantwortlichkeiten architektur und entwicklung ki-gestützter anwendungen: konzeption, design, prototyping und umsetzung moderner softwarelösungen mit integrierten ml und ki-komponenten (llms, rag, tool-integration) und optimierten benutzeroberflächen. agenten- und llm-systeme: entwicklung von ai-agenten, multi-agent-architekturen und mcp-basierten lösungen. integration externer tools, apis und unternehmenssysteme in intelligente workflows. machine learning: unterstützung bei der datenaufbereitung, der datenanalyse, sowie bei design, training und evaluation von machine learning modellen basierend auf strukturierten und unstrukturierten daten. inhouse-llm-plattformen: mitwirken beim betrieb und ausbau eigener, leistungsfähiger llm-infrastrukturen mit sicherstellung von performance, skalierbarkeit, security und governance. ki im entwicklungsprozess : breiter einsatz von ki-tools zur effizienzsteigerung, automatisierung und qualitätsverbesserung im software-engineering. sicherheit & responsible ai: berücksichtigung von security by design, datenschutz, zugriffskontrollen sowie verantwortungsvollem und transparentem ki-einsatz. zusammenarbeit & enablement: enge zusammenarbeit mit softwareentwicklern, architekten und fachverantwortlichen. aufbau interner standards, best practices und ki-tooling. anforderung ihr profil und ihre expertise: ausbildung : sehr guter abschluss eines studiums (fh, eth, uni) in informatik oder einer vergleichbaren fachrichtung. software-engineering: sehr gute programmierkenntnisse (insbesondere python und web-technologien), erfahrung mit modernen software- und system-architekturen sowie entwicklungsmethoden, testing, code reviews und kollaborativer softwareentwicklung. daten : sicherer und weitsichtiger umgang mit datenquellen (sql, nosql, unstrukturiert), gute erfahrung mit datenpipelines, der aufbereitung von daten und dem feature engineering. applied ai & llms: praktische erfahrung mit llms und generativer ki in produktiven anwendungen. kenntnisse in bereichen wie retrieval-augmented generation (rag), agentic ai, tool-use/function calling, mcps, prompt engineering und evaluierungsmethoden. projektleitung und kundeninteraktion: erfahrung in der fachlichen führung kleinerer projekte. souveränes auftreten im direkten kundenkontakt sowie mitwirkung bei der planung und durchführung von kundenworkshops (z.b. anforderungsanalyse, use-case-definition, architektur- und lösungsabstimmung). ki-infrastruktur & betrieb: erste erfahrungen im hosting und betrieb eigener ki-lösungen (on-prem oder hybrid). verständnis für containerisierung (docker), orchestrierung (z.b. kubernetes), gpu-nutzung sowie performance- und skalierungsaspekte. devops & qualitätssicherung: erfahrung mit devops-tools, ci/cd, automatisiertem testing, observability und strukturiertem performance- und kostenmonitoring von ki-anwendungen. persönliche kompetenzen: hoher anspruch an qualität, robustheit und nachhaltigkeit von lösungen. strukturierte arbeitsweise, technische argumentationsstärke, adressatengerechte kommunikation und freude an der weitergabe von wissen und an interdisziplinärer zusammenarbeit. sprachen : sehr gute deutsch- und englischkenntnisse in wort und schrift. warum helbling? sie begleiten ihre projekte von der konzeption bis in den betrieb. sie arbeiten an technologisch anspruchsvollen vorhaben mit hoher fachlicher tiefe in unterschiedlichsten kundendomänen - von gezielten innovationsprojekten bis hin zu strategischen plattforminitiativen - und übernehmen substanzielle technische verantwortung in einem interdisziplinären umfeld. wir bieten ihnen gestaltungsraum, moderne technologien und ein umfeld, das technologische exzellenz mit unternehmerischem denken verbindet. helbling benefits spannende und abwechslungsreiche tätigkeiten und projekte ein dynamisches und interdisziplinäres umfeld mit flachen hierarchien und kurzen entscheidungswegen, in dem sie mit ihrem engagement massgeblich zu den projekterfolgen beitragen ein motiviertes und aufgestelltes team einen zentral gelegenen arbeitsort flexible arbeitsbedingungen und eine attraktive und leistungsorientierte vergütung freuen sie sich auf kompetente kolleginnen und kollegen, eine offene firmenkultur, eine moderne infrastruktur und attraktive arbeitsbedingungen sind sie interessiert? dann freuen wir uns über ihre aussagekräftigen und vollständigen bewerbungsunterlagen mit bezug auf die gewünschten fähigkeiten ausschliesslich über unser bewerberportal . wir bitten um verständnis dafür, dass wir nur direktbewerbungen berücksichtigen.

job ai for education platform specialist & benchmark engineer swiss federal institute of technology lausanne, epfl workplace lausanne - lake geneva region - switzerland category environment | pedagogy position regular employment / collaborator published 26 february 2026 epfl, the swiss federal institute of technology in lausanne, is one of the most dynamic university campuses in europe and ranks among the top 20 universities worldwide. the epfl employs more than 6,500 people supporting the three main missions of the institutions: education, research and innovation. the epfl campus offers an exceptional working environment at the heart of a community of more than 18,500 people, including over 14,000 students and 4,000 researchers from more than 120 different countries. about the position epfl has developed a comprehensive ai infrastructure ecosystem serving education and analytics. built around our graph ai platform, rcp computational infrastructure, and intelligent agents framework, this ecosystem currently powers 20+ ai tutors, semantic search capabilities, and data analytics tools. we are seeking an ai for education platform coordinator who will serve as both a power-user and benchmark guardian of our ai infrastructure. this is a hands-on technical role focused on making our platform accessible to new users while ensuring our ai systems meet the highest standards across technical, ethical and ecological dimensions. a key aspect of this role involves close collaboration with epfl’s ai center to bridge research and practice. our infrastructure includes: graph ai platform: knowledge graph, semantic search, and rag construction pipelines rcp computational infrastructure: gpu clusters, local llms, specialized ai services intelligent agents framework: orchestration layer for chatbots and ai applications multiple data sources: educational content, institutional data, research publications mission you will bridge the gap between our sophisticated ai infrastructure and the diverse teams that can benefit from it. as a power-user, you’ll master our tools, document them thoroughly, and train others. as an evaluator, you’ll establish rigorous testing frameworks to ensure our ai systems are responsible, efficient, cost-effective, and sustainable. you will also serve as a key liaison with epfl’s ai center, facilitating the integration of cutting-edge research findings into our educational ai platform and enabling research projects that leverage our infrastructure and data. main duties and responsibilities 1. comprehensive ai benchmarking (60%) develop and maintain a rigorous benchmark evaluation framework: ethical dimension streamline bias detection tests (gender, language, cultural biases) create transparency documentation: model capabilities, limitations, training data, appropriate use cases provide sustainability recommendations for model selection and green ai practices technical dimension apply performance benchmarking harness (latency, throughput, accuracy) create comparative evaluation matrix: local llms (rcp) vs. apertus vs. commercial service. develop domain-specific and educational test sets to evaluate llms ai center collaboration facilitate the integration of research findings from epfl’s ai labs into our educational platform collaborate with the ai center to benchmark and integrate apertus, their open weight model, into our platform stack support research projects that can benefit from our infrastructure or educational data collection capabilities 2. infrastructure enablement & platform adoption (40%) make our ai platform accessible to others and scaling up: documentation & knowledge sharing write comprehensive technical documentation (user guides, api docs, tutorials) create templates and boilerplates for common scenarios develop configuration wizards to simplify complex setups platform advocacy build relationships with potential users across epfl and partner institutions identify and test new application domains beyond education foster connections between the educational ai platform and research teams at the ai center profile education & experience master’s degree in computer science, data science, ai/ml, or related field 2-3 years of professional experience working with ai/ml systems proven experience with large language models, rag systems, or similar ai technologies background in software testing or evaluation methodologies technical skills proficient in python programming experience with ml frameworks and libraries (langchain, transformers, vector databases) understanding of cloud/on-premise infrastructure (gpu clusters, containerization) knowledge of evaluation metrics and benchmarking methodologies desired qualifications background in ai ethics, responsible ai, or fairness in ml background in learning sciences, educational psychology, or pedagogy experience with open-source communities and documentation we offer professional environment work at the cutting edge of ai in education at one of europe’s leading technical universities access to state-of-the-art computational infrastructure unique opportunity to bridge ai research and educational practice development opportunities continuous learning environment with access to courses and training participation in conferences and professional development events opportunity to contribute to open-source projects direct exposure to cutting-edge ai research and development informations contract start date : activity rate min : 80.00 activity rate max : 100.00 contract type: cdd duration: 1 year, renewable reference: 2094 more information in your application, please refer to myscience.ch and reference jobid69297 .

title: Cloud Engineer (w/m) 80-100%
description: about the job "über den wolken muss die freiheit wohl grenzenlos sein." wirklich? ja klar, durch unsere grosse gestaltungsfreiheit bei der weiterentwicklung und optimierung der css-cloud-plattform können wir tatsächlich grenzen verschieben. wir sind ein team aus 10 engineers, die gemeinsam die cloud strategie umsetzen und ein umfeld schaffen, in dem unsere azure paas und die kubernetes-basierte on-prem infrastruktur zu einem hybriden ökosystem verschmelzen. soweit, so gut? dann gestalte mit uns die cloud-zukunft der css - wir freuen uns auf dich! cloud engineer (w/m) 80-100% so sieht dein alltag aus zum herzstück: du gestaltest und betreibst unser neues cloud-ökosystem und bringst deine azure paas-expertise ein. hand in hand mit unseren site reliability engineers (sres), die den on-prem kubernetes stack betreuen, treibst du die entstehung unseres neuen cloud-ökosystems voran. immer auf den neusten stand: nach dem infrastructure-as-code-ansatz (z.b. terraform, git) baust du moderne it-infrastrukturen und arbeitest nach aktuellen entwicklungspraktiken. ai-tools und ai-basierte ansätze in der cloud begeistern dich und dank deines know-hows darin, entwickelst du innovative lösungen. das bringst du mit du verfügst über ein abgeschlossenes studium in informatik (fh, uni, eth) oder eine vergleichbare ausbildung. du hast erste praxiserfahrung oder bereits vertiefte expertise und möchtest dich weiterentwickeln - wir sind da offen. hauptsache du hast freude, dich in neue themen einzuarbeiten. du bringst idealerweise erfahrung mit azure, terraform, infrastructure as code, git und hybriden cloud-umgebungen mit. ein plus: wenn du dich mit kubernetes und cloud-native-technologien auskennst. offen und kommunikativ, so ist deine arbeitsweise. du packst selbständig an, bist kundenorientiert und hast spass an teamarbeit. du sprichst fliessend deutsch. gute englischkenntnisse sind von vorteil. css versicherung 6002 luzern / hybrid

title: Principal Platform Engineer (Java, Architecture & Enablement)
description: job summary show sonar prevents code quality issues and enhances productivity. join a dynamic team with a strong culture and benefits. tasks design and build solutions for streamlined developer workflows. mentor and elevate technical standards within the team. prototype emerging technologies to validate their value. skills 10+ years of software engineering experience required. expertise in cloud-native architecture and distributed systems. strong communication and internal evangelism skills. is this helpful? about the job who is sonar? sonar helps prevent code quality and code security issues from reaching production, amplifies developers' productivity in concert with ai assistants, and improves the developer experience with streamlined workflows. sonar analyzes all code, regardless of who writes it — your internal team, genai, or third parties — resulting in more secure, reliable, and maintainable applications. rooted in the open source community, sonar’s solutions support over 30 programming languages, frameworks, and infrastructure technologies. today, sonar is used by +7m developers and 400k organizations worldwide, including the dod, microsoft, nasa, mastercard, siemens, and t-mobile. we believe in developing great products that are supported by great internal teams and a strong culture. we are highly committed to and obsessed with the company, users, each other, and our open source community. we have high standards and hold each other accountable for acting with positivity, dedication, thoughtfulness, empathy, and passion daily. we are deliberate with our decisions with high clarity of intention. at the same time, we feel extreme urgency and move forward quickly. and lastly, we are highly effective and operationally efficient . we operate collectively as one team to accomplish our goals. at sonar, code is more than just an acronym – it's a mindset that defines daily operations. why you should apply: at sonar, we’re a group of brilliant, motivated, and driven professionals working hard to help supercharge developers to build better, faster. sonar helps to continuously improve code quality and code security while reducing developer toil. this means that developers can focus on doing more of what they love and less of what they don’t. our solutions don’t just solve symptoms of problems – we help fix issues at the source – for all code, whether it's developer-written, ai-generated, or from third parties. we have a dynamic culture with employees worldwide and hub offices in the usa, switzerland, the uk, singapore, and germany. team members should be able to come to work every day, work on a product they are proud of, love what they do, and feel energized by their peers. with our roots deep in the open source community, we’re all about the mission: supercharge developers to build better, faster. the impact you will have: as a principal platform engineer (architecture & enablement) , you will be the technical catalyst behind our "golden path" strategy, turning architectural vision into tangible engineering reality. you will sit at the intersection of our platform division and our product software engineers, providing them with the autonomy to ship faster and safer. you will design and build the "golden path" engine—the core scaffolding, cli tools, and internal portal integrations—that allows engineering teams to bootstrap production-ready services in minutes, not days. you will engineer the foundational software blocks and libraries that solve common backend challenges once, enabling product teams to focus on business logic rather than reinventing infrastructure plumbing. you will act as a force multiplier, actively identifying friction points in our entire development lifecycle (from ide to production) and building the integration "glue" that eliminates them. you will serve as the r&d arm for the platform, prototyping emerging technologies (e.g., coding agents, ephemeral environments) to validate their value before scaling them across the organization. \n what you will do daily: build the "glue": you won't just design on whiteboards; you will write the high-leverage code—whether it’s a custom backstage plugin, a specific github action, or a cli in go/python—that bridges the gap between our raw infrastructure and the developer experience. experiment & prototype: you will create "tracer bullet" implementations for new architectural standards, proving they work in code before advocating for their adoption across the fleet. engage as an embedded expert: you will partner directly with product squads, not as an auditor, but as a co-pilot—helping them adopt the golden paths and gathering direct feedback to iterate on the platform product. mentorship & technical leadership: you will elevate the technical bar of the platform engineering division, mentoring other engineers on modern software design, automation strategies, and "platform as a product" thinking. the experience you will need: principal-level "builder" mindset: you have 10+ years of software engineering experience and still love to code. you are comfortable jumping into a complex java/python codebase to refactor a core component or writing a new tool in go/typescript from scratch. cloud native architecture mastery: you possess deep technical expertise in modern infrastructure standards— networking, containers and kubernetes. you understand how to design distributed systems that fully exploit these platforms (e.g., resilience patterns, sidecars, ephemeral scaling) rather than just "lifting and shifting" legacy applications. forward-looking innovation (ai & agents): you have a pulse on the future of software engineering. you are actively exploring how genai, llm agents, and intelligent automation can revolutionize the developer experience, and you have the curiosity to build the experimental tools that prove it. platform product engineering: you treat internal infrastructure as a product, but you understand that the best interface is no interface. you have moved beyond building static service catalogs (like backstage) and have experience building cli-first platforms and ide-integrated workflows that scale "golden paths" to hundreds of users without forcing them to switch contexts. influence without authority & internal evangelism (devrel): you combine the empathy of a developer advocate with the strategic weight of a principal engineer. you drive adoption not by mandate, but by winning hearts and minds—marketing the platform’s value, building internal communities, and acting as the "sales engineer" for the golden path \n we value diversity, equity, and inclusion: at sonar, we believe that our diversity is our strength. we are a global company that values and respects different backgrounds, perspectives, and cultures. we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their best. we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. all offers of employment at sonar are contingent upon the precise results of a comprehensive background check and reference verification conducted before the start date. we do not currently support visa candidates in the us. applications that are submitted through agencies or third party recruiters will not be considered.

title: Cloud Software Engineer 80-100% (a)
description: about the job deine arbeitsstelle bei axians amanox entwickeln wir nicht nur software - wir bauen die cloud-plattformen von morgen. unsere engineers arbeiten mit python und den neuesten aws-services an skalierbaren anwendungen, die echten business-impact liefern. dabei denken wir ganzheitlich: von der architektur über die entwicklung bis zum betrieb. infrastructure as code, ci/cd und moderne devops-praktiken sind für uns keine buzzwords, sondern gelebte realität. ob ai-integration, event-driven architecture oder serverless - bei uns triffst du auf spannende technische herausforderungen und ein team, das wissen teilt statt hortet. dieses tätigkeitsfeld begeistert dich entwicklung und architektur: du entwickelst skalierbare cloud-anwendungen mit python und triffst fundierte architekturentscheidungen - von microservices über event-driven architectures bis hin zu serverless-lösungen. aws als deine spielwiese: du konzipierst und implementierst moderne software auf aws und nutzt dabei das volle potenzial der cloud-plattform. end-to-end ownership: du begleitest features und projekte vom ersten design bis zum produktiven betrieb - inklusive ci/cd-pipelines und infrastructure as code. kundenprojekte gestalten: du arbeitest direkt mit kunden zusammen, verstehst ihre business-anforderungen und übersetzt diese in technische lösungen. dabei übernimmst du auch gelegentlich die technische projektleitung. devops leben, nicht nur reden: automatisierung ist für dich keine pflicht, sondern eine selbstverständlichkeit - du entwickelst mit infrastructure as code (terraform, cdk) und baust robuste deployment-pipelines. innovation und austausch: du experimentierst in unseren lab-umgebungen, wirkst bei internen formaten (tech talks, team challenges) sowie externen events mit. deine expertise ist gefragt must have: fundierte entwicklungserfahrung: mehrjährige praktische erfahrung in der softwareentwicklung mit java oder python (mid-level oder höher) software-architektur-know-how: du verstehst design patterns, kannst architekturentscheidungen begründen und hast erfahrung mit microservices, apis oder event-driven design aws-praxis: hands-on-erfahrung mit aws - du kennst die wichtigsten services und weisst, wie man cloud-native entwickelt devops-tooling: praktische erfahrung mit iac-tools (terraform, cdk o.ä.), container-technologien (docker, ecs/eks) und ci/cd-pipelines kommunikationsstark: du kannst technische konzepte klar vermitteln und fühlst dich im direkten kundenkontakt wohl nice to have: aws-zertifizierungen (solutions architect, developer) erfahrung mit ai/ml-services (aws bedrock, sagemaker) oder starkes interesse, diesen bereich zu erkunden kubernetes / eks in produktiven umgebungen erfahrung in agilen methoden (scrum, kanban) und modernen engineering practices bei uns zählt deine persönlichkeit du arbeitest selbstständig, triffst fundierte entscheidungen und übernimmst verantwortung für dein handeln. mit deiner dienstleistungsorientierten, flexiblen und hilfsbereiten art sowie deiner offenen, kommunikationsstarken persönlichkeit fühlst du dich in einem interkulturellen umfeld wohl. wissenstransfer, code reviews und gegenseitige unterstützung sind für dich selbstverständlich und prägen die zusammenarbeit im team. probleme gehst du hartnäckig und lösungsorientiert an und behältst dabei stets ein hohes qualitätsbewusstsein. die sich schnell weiterentwickelnde cloud-welt motiviert dich, kontinuierlich dazuzulernen und neue erkenntnisse aktiv ins team einzubringen. mit deiner strukturierten und präzisen arbeitsweise unterstützt du unsere kunden kompetent und leistest als zuverlässige:r teamplayer:in einen wesentlichen beitrag zum gemeinsamen erfolg - ohne den spass an der täglichen arbeit zu verlieren. wir haben viel zu bieten unsere kultur ist offen, transparent und wir kommunizieren im partnerschaftlichen «du» auf augenhöhe. deine ideen und innovationskraft sind willkommen, denn wir treffen unsere entscheidungen lokal - wie in einem kmu. dennoch musst du nicht auf die vorteile eines grossen unternehmens verzichten; axians ist teil des weltumspannenden vinci-konzerns mit annähernd 285'000 mitarbeitenden. unser versprechen «the best of ict with a human touch» halten wir konsequent ein und unsere grundwerte; eigenständigkeit, verantwortung, unternehmergeist, vertrauen und solidarität leiten unsere zusammenarbeit - lokal, national und international. erfolg braucht perspektiven in vielen disziplinen gehören wir zu den marktführern. unsere kunden vertrauen uns ihre wichtigen projekte an und unsere teams erbringen für sie dienstleistungen am puls der technologie - manchmal überregional oder sogar international. ein spannendes arbeitsumfeld ist dadurch gewährleistet. damit unsere teams selbst die anspruchsvollsten aufgaben erfolgreich lösen können, fördern wir gezielt die fachliche und persönliche weiterentwicklung jedes einzelnen. bei axians in der schweiz und innerhalb des vinci-konzerns stehen dir national und weltweit viele wege offen. deine weiteren vorteile bonusaktienprogramme für mitarbeitende des vinci konzerns attraktive vergütungen und sozialleistungen flexible arbeitsbedingungen programme zur persönlichen weiterbildung und entwicklung

title: Metallbauer/in (Werkstatt/Schweissen)
description:
job summary show join a highly successful, traditional company known for quality work. opportunity for growth in a creative, supportive environment. tasks independently assemble various welding constructions for compensators. perform x-ray safe welding according to plans using wig/tig and mig/mag. collaborate effectively in a team-oriented atmosphere. skills training as a metalworker with extensive practical experience required. efficient and independent work approach essential. positive personality and teamwork skills are a must. is this helpful? about the job

who is sonar?


sonar helps prevent code quality and code security issues from reaching production, amplifies developerss a mindset that defines daily operations.


why you should apply:


at sonar, we’re a group of brilliant, motivated, and driven professionals working hard to help supercharge developers to build better, faster. sonar helps to continuously improve code quality and code security while reducing developer toil. this means that developers can focus on doing more of what they love and less of what they don’t. our solutions don’t just solve symptoms of problems – we help fix issues at the source – for all code, whether its software, we must empower millions of developers to fix them automatically. with over 400,000 enterprises relying on our products, we hold a unique lever to shape how software is built.


recent breakthroughs in ai have made autonomous remediation a reality, but the industry faces a major hurdle: trust. enterprises cannot automate what they do not trust. as a software engineer in the codegen squad, you will build the critical backend components for verified autonomous remediation. you will work within a high-performing team to turn research prototypes into reliable, production-grade features that test and validate ai-generated code. you will help us close the "trust gap" by delivering robust software that just works.

\n


what you will do daily:
  • build features for the "unified remediation engine". you will implement the backend logic that powers our remediation efforts. you will write clean, reliable code (java/python) that routes requests between deterministic quickfixes and llm agents, ensuring features are delivered reliably within our existing framework.
  • implement production-grade agent logic. you will take concepts from the research team and "productionize" them. you will write the specific workflows that allow the agent to read ci/cd errors, attempt fixes, and iterate until the build is green.
  • own your code from local to cloud. you are responsible for the full lifecycle of the features you build. you will deploy your services to aws, monitor their health (metrics/logs), and troubleshoot production issues to ensure high availability for our users.
  • secure & optimize execution. working within our existing sandboxing framework, you will implement the runners and isolation layers required to execute ai-generated code safely. you will ensure your implementation is secure and efficient.
  • collaborate & share knowledge. you will be an active member of the squad, reviewing prs, documenting your work, and sharing knowledge with peers. you will act as a subject matter expert for the specific components you own, ensuring the team moves forward together.


the experience you will need:
  • solid backend engineering (3+ years). you have a track record of building and maintaining backend systems. you write clean, testable code and care about software craftsmanship.
  • polyglot versatility (java & python). you are comfortable with one of the core languages: java (for integration with the core sonar ecosystem) or python (for ai/agent logic). you pick up new tools and syntax quickly.
  • cloud operations (aws). you understand how your code runs in the cloud. you have experience with aws (lambda, ecs, or similar) and are comfortable with deployment pipelines, logging, and basic infrastructure monitoring.
  • systems fundamentals. you understand how different services talk to each other (rest, queues, async processing). you know how to debug a distributed system when things go wrong.
  • interest in ai/llms. you are excited about the potential of ai in software development. experience using llm apis (openai/anthropic) is a plus, but a willingness to learn how to integrate them into backend workflows is essential.
  • ownership mindset. you donre happy to help our team acquire them.
  • as the leader in our field, our products and services are as strong as our internal team members.
  • we embrace transparency with regular meetings, cascading messages and updates on the growth and success of our organization.


benefits of working with sonar - geneva:
  • we encourage usage of our robust time-off allocations with 27 pto days for our employees based out of the geneva region, plus additional days based on seniority and circumstances.
  • we contribute 60% of the total cost for your pension; 13.5% to 15.5% of your base salary for savings; 2% for risk.
  • generous discretionary company growth bonus, paid annually.
  • commuting: sustainable mobility options, including carpooling and the refund of 60% of the annual transportation subscription.
  • global workforce with employees in 20+ countries representing 35+ unique nationalities.
  • we have an annual kick-off somewhere in the world where we meet to build relationships and goals for the company.


\n

we value diversity, equity, and inclusion:


at sonar, we believe that our diversity is our strength. we are a global company that values and respects different backgrounds, perspectives, and cultures.


we are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment where everyone feels valued and empowered to contribute their best. we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and welcome all qualified applicants, regardless of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.


all offers of employment at sonar are contingent upon the precise results of a comprehensive background check and reference verification conducted before the start date.


applications that are submitted through agencies or third party recruiters will not be considered.

title: Lead UX Designer
description: job summary show join scandit as a lead ux designer in zurich, shaping user experiences. enjoy a flexible, innovative work environment with amazing benefits. tasks lead ux design for scandit products, enhancing mobile app experiences. translate complex tech into intuitive user experiences through design. collaborate with cross-functional teams to achieve user experience goals. skills 8+ years in ux design, with a strong background in mobile products. expertise in ios and android design patterns and accessibility best practices. proficiency in modern design tools like figma and design systems. is this helpful? about the job lead ux designer scandit zurich imagine the what. build the how. scandit gives people superpowers. whether enabling delivery drivers to make quicker deliveries, matching a patient with their medication, or allowing retailers to make store operations more efficient, our technology automates workflows. it provides actionable insights to help businesses in a variety of industries. join us as we continue to expand, grow, innovate, and help take scandit to the next level. your opportunity we're looking for a lead ux designer to shape how users experience scandit's technology - designing intuitive, efficient workflows and mobile app experiences that help people do their best work. this is a hands-on, highly experienced design role: you'll be the senior design voice on your product area, guiding quality and mentoring teammates while staying deeply involved in the craft. you'll join a cross-functional team working closely with product managers and engineers to bring human-centered design to enterprise-scale solutions. lead ux design for one or more scandit product areas, including mobile app experiences, shaping workflows from early concept through implementation. translate complex technical capabilities into simple, powerful user experiences by creating clear user flows, interactive prototypes, and high-fidelity designs for industries such as retail, logistics, and healthcare. collaborate closely with product managers, engineers, tech leads, and qa to ensure designs are delivered faithfully and meet user experience goals. partner with our research specialists to plan and conduct user studies and usability testing, running lightweight studies independently when needed. own and evolve scandit's product design system , ensuring our products are cohesive, intuitive, and effective across platforms. guide the visual direction of your product area and maintain alignment with scandit's brand identity. who we look for 8+ years as a ux designer in saas, enterprise, or technology-focused environments; startup or consultancy experience is a plus. completed degree in product design, interaction design, ux design, or equivalent professional experience. demonstrated experience delivering end-to-end ux solutions - from research and concepting to detailed design and implementation - especially for mobile products. proven expertise in ios and android design patterns and accessibility best practices. proficiency in modern design tools (figma), design systems, and component libraries, including ai-assisted prototyping. hands-on experience working collaboratively in cross-functional product teams with product, engineering, and enterprise success. effective communication skills and a collaborative mindset; you share work early, invite feedback, and help create a culture of open dialogue and continuous learning. comfortable leading through craft expertise and influence - this is a senior individual contributor role, not a management position. fluent in english and german. occasional travel may be required for field research or onsite collaboration. nice to have: experience designing augmented reality (ar) or camera-based mobile interactions. the good stuff here are just some of the reasons why people choose to build their career at scandit: we are certified as a “great place to work” in 7 countries! smart, people-first culture flexible, office, hybrid or home working innovation hackathons global team outings festive/end of year all company celebrations your birthday off learning and development opportunities an attractive individual equity plan in a high growth company top notch tech pack to enable you to do your most productive work brand new optimized-for-hybrid working hq in zurich as well as local offices in hotspots london, tampere, warsaw, boston and tokyo as well as specific benefits related to the location you are joining at scandit we strive to create an inclusive environment that empowers our employees. we believe that our products and services benefit from our diverse backgrounds and experiences and are proud to be a safe space for all. all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, nationality, religion, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, age, physical [dis]ability or length of time spent unemployed. imagine the what. build the how. “everybody is welcome here” -
